Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text

Imports System.ComponentModel

Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms

Public Class FrmMain

    Public aStep As Double
    Public RealAirToolCount As Integer

    Private RFID_Pallet_No As String

    Private PLC_STRING_1 As String

    Private StartTime As String
    Private EndTime As String
    Private SELECT_PART As String
    Private wStep As Double
    Private Address_Connection_PLC1 As String
    Private Flag_Connection_PLC1 As Boolean
    Public PLC_VALUE(0 To 100) As Integer
    Private ACT_PLC1 As AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP

    Private IN_LABEL(10) As Label
    Private OUT_LABEL(10) As Label
    Private VALUE_IN_LABEL(10) As Label
    Private VALUE_OUT_LABEL(10) As Label

    Private RFID_PortNO As Long
    Private Recv_Count As Double
    Private Flag_Connection As Boolean
    Private Trd1 As Thread
    Private Trd2 As Thread
    Private Trd3 As Thread
    Private RecvString As New System.Text.StringBuilder()

    Private Tool1_Delay_count As Double
    Private Tool1_Ready As Boolean
    Private Tool_String1 As String
    Private Tool_Connection1 As Boolean
    Private Tool1_Count As Integer

    ' HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 8가지 조합 IO 조건
    Private Hgt_LH_QY(4) As String
    Private Hgt_LH_KY(4) As String
    Private Hgt_RH_QY(4) As String
    Private Hgt_RH_KY(4) As String
    Private NHgt_LH_QY(4) As String
    Private NHgt_LH_KY(4) As String
    Private NHgt_RH_QY(4) As String
    Private NHgt_RH_KY(4) As String
    Private CurrentToolP() As String ' 현재 제품에 선택된 IO 조건 (wStep=5에서 결정)
    Private toolstep As Integer      ' 툴 스텝 상태

    Private OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE As String
    Private Player As New SoundPlayer

    Private Sub DingDOng()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\DINGDONG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

    End Sub

    Private Sub NG()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

    End Sub

    Private Sub LabelNameing()

        IN_LABEL(0) = LABEL_ADDRESS_IN_0
        IN_LABEL(1) = LABEL_ADDRESS_IN_1
        IN_LABEL(2) = LABEL_ADDRESS_IN_2

        OUT_LABEL(0) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_0
        OUT_LABEL(1) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_1
        OUT_LABEL(2) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_2
        OUT_LABEL(3) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_3
        OUT_LABEL(4) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_4
        OUT_LABEL(5) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_5

        VALUE_IN_LABEL(0) = VALUE_ADDRESS_IN_0
        VALUE_IN_LABEL(1) = VALUE_ADDRESS_IN_1
        VALUE_IN_LABEL(2) = VALUE_ADDRESS_IN_2

        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_0
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_1
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_2
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_3
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_4
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_5

        'IN_LABEL(0).Text = "W0000"
        'IN_LABEL(1).Text = "W0001"

        'OUT_LABEL(0).Text = "W0050"
        'OUT_LABEL(1).Text = "W0051"
        'OUT_LABEL(2).Text = "W0052"
        'OUT_LABEL(3).Text = "W0053"
        'OUT_LABEL(4).Text = "W0054"
        'OUT_LABEL(5).Text = "W0055"

        IN_LABEL(0).Text = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress, "0000")
        IN_LABEL(1).Text = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 1, "0000")
        IN_LABEL(2).Text = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 2, "0000")

        OUT_LABEL(0).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(1).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 1, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(2).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 2, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(3).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 3, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(4).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 4, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(5).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 5, "0000")

    End Sub


    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button3_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        FrmPort.Show()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        End
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPicture(ByVal picTarget As PictureBox, ByVal picName As String)

        Try
            picTarget.Image = System.Drawing.Image.FromFile(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Image\" & picName & ".png")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        'LoadPicture(Picture_Main, "ASSEMBLE\NHGT")

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitControl()

        aStep = 0
        RealAirToolCount = 0

        REWORK_STOP = False
        Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = ""
        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = ""
        TargetBlower.Text = ""
        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = ""
        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = ""
        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_Total_DEC.Text = ""
        Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.White

        Panel_PartName.Text = ""
        Panel_Before.Text = ""
        Panel_PartNo.Text = ""
        Panel_CarType.Text = ""
        Panel_Position.Text = ""
        Panel_HGT.Text = ""
        Panel_SN.Text = ""
        Panel_Vent.Text = ""
        Panel_Warmer.Text = ""
        Panel_Undertray.Text = ""
        Panel_Can.Text = ""
        Panel_Rework.Text = ""
        Panel_Now.Text = ""

        Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
        Panel_RF_DataCHeck.Text = ""
        Panel_RF_DataCHeck.BackColor = Color.White

        For i As Integer = 1 To 8
            SHAPE_W(i) = 0
            SHAPE_H(i) = 0
        Next

        Panel_TQ1.Text = ""
        Panel_TQ2.Text = ""
        Panel_TQ3.Text = ""
        Panel_TQ4.Text = ""
        Panel_TQ5.Text = ""

        Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = ""
        Panel_TQ2_DEC.Text = ""
        Panel_TQ3_DEC.Text = ""
        Panel_TQ4_DEC.Text = ""
        Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = ""

        Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.White

        pos1.Text = ""
        pos2.Text = ""
        pos3.Text = ""
        pos4.Text = ""
        pos5.Text = ""
        toolstep = 0

        Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_Before.ForeColor = Color.White

        Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_Rework.ForeColor = Color.White

        Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_Now.ForeColor = Color.White

        LoadPicture(Picture_Main, "NON")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then

            'RFID Data length => 1A(26자리) 읽어오기 *앞 3자리 파레트 넘버 나머지 23자리 시리얼 넘버
            Serial_RFID.Write(Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H05") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1A") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(ByVal str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Dim RFID_Tag_Data As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    Else
                        RFID_Tag_Data = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 26)
                        Label11.Text = RFID_Tag_Data
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 4, 23)
                        RFID_Pallet_No = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 1, 3)
                        'Panel_Pallet.Text = RFID_Pallet_No
                    End If
                    'For i = 1 To sRecvData.Length
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & Mid(sRecvData, i, 1) & " "
                    'Next
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & vbCrLf
                    sRecvData = ""
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub


    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_Rfid
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID Fail " & PortNumber_Rfid)
        End Try

        If PortNumber_Scanner = "NONE" Then
        Else
            Try
                If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Scanner.Close()
                End If
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_Scanner
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            Catch ex As Exception

                MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_Scanner)
            End Try
        End If

        If PortNumber_Tool1 = "NONE" Then

        Else
            Try
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_Tool1
                If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Tool1.Close()
                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
                Else
                    Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                    Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool1.Open()
                End If
                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Tmr_TOOL1.Interval = 5000
                Tmr_TOOL1.Start()
            Catch ex As Exception
                MsgBox("Serial Open Tool Fail " & PortNumber_Tool1)
            End Try
        End If

        If PortNumber_Tool2 = "NONE" Then

        Else
            Try

            Catch ex As Exception
                Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_Tool2
                If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Tool2.Close()
                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
                Else
                    Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
                    Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Tool2.Open()
                End If
                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Tmr_TOOL2.Interval = 5000
                Tmr_TOOL2.Start()
            End Try
        End If
        If PortNumber_Module = "NONE" Then
        Else
            Try

                If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Module.Close()
                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Module.Open()
                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
                Else
                    Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                    Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                    Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                    Serial_Module.Open()
                    'Label8.Text = "Module OK"
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_Module)

            End Try
        End If


    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar

                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String1) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection1 = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0061" Then

                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))

                            ' N/HGT toolstep 10~14 (CurrentToolP 사용)
                            If toolstep = 10 Then
                                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(0)) Then
                                    If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        Panel_TQ1.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                        Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue

                                        Panel_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        Panel_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue

                                        toolstep = 12

                                        Panel_TQ4.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                        Panel_TQ4_DEC.Text = "OK"

                                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()
                                End If

                            ElseIf toolstep = 103 Then
                                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(3)) Then
                                    If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        Panel_TQ4.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                        Panel_TQ4_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                        toolstep = 104
                                    End If
                                Else
                                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.Text = "POS NG"
                                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()
                                End If

                            ElseIf toolstep = 104 Then
                                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(4)) Then
                                    If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                        Panel_TQ5.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                        Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                        Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                        DingDOng()
                                        toolstep = 1000
                                    End If
                                Else
                                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "POS NG"
                                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String1 = ""
                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String1 = Tool_String1 & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

        ElseIf Tool1Connection = True Then

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()
        Dim ScanDAta As String = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)

        '        첫자리 LH, RH
        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력

        If wStep > 5 Then

            If (ScanDAta.Contains("LS") = True Or ScanDAta.Contains("RS") = True) And Panel_Pump_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then

                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                If CheckPumpDuplicated(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text) = False Then
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "LS" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 2) = "RS" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    End If
                Else
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                End If

            Else

                If Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                    If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        If CheckBlowerDuplicated(Panel_Scanner_Input.Text) = True Then
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "Duplicated"
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                            wStep = 9
                        Else
                            Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        End If
                    Else
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If

                End If

            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PlcConnect()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PlcRead()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PlcRead()

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 11
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim i As Integer

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        'szDeviceName = "W0000" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0001" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0050" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0051" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0052" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0053" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0054" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0055" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0056" & vbLf &
        '                        "W0057"

        szDeviceName = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 1, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 2, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 1, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 2, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 3, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 4, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 5, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 6, "0000") & vbLf &
                                "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 7, "0000")
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress) = PLC_VALUE(0)
            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 1) = PLC_VALUE(1)
            PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 2) = PLC_VALUE(2)

            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress) = PLC_VALUE(3)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 1) = PLC_VALUE(4)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 2) = PLC_VALUE(5)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 3) = PLC_VALUE(6)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 4) = PLC_VALUE(7)
            PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 5) = PLC_VALUE(8)

            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 1)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(2).Text = PlcDw(PlcInStartAddress + 2)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 1)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 2)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PlcDw(PlcOutStartAddress + 5)

            For j = 0 To 2
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Part(ByVal str As String)

        ConnectionOpenSql()
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            Panel_PartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            Panel_PartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Panel_CarType.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Option_CarType").Value)
            Panel_Position.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Option_LHRH").Value)
            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)

            'HGT (o), Undertray (x) = 4
            'N/HGT (o), Undertray (o) = 6
            'N/HGT (o), Undertray (x) = 4

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("SEMI") = True Then
                Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT"
                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"

                Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                Panel_TQ4_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                Panel_TQ1.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ2.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ3.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ4.Text = "NA"
                Panel_TQ5.Text = "NA"
            Else

                ElseIf Rs.Fields("OPtion_HGT").Value = False And Rs.Fields("Option_UNDERTRAY").Value = True Then

                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ1.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ2.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ3.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ4.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ5.Text = "NA"
                ElseIf Rs.Fields("OPtion_HGT").Value = False And Rs.Fields("Option_UNDERTRAY").Value = False Then
                    Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT"
                    Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ2_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green

                    Panel_TQ3.Text = "NA"
                    Panel_TQ4.Text = "NA"

            If Rs.Fields("Option_UNDERTRAY").Value = True Then
                Panel_Undertray.Text = "UNDERTRAY"

    Private Function CheckDuplicated(strcolName As String, strVAl As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where " & strcolName & " = '" & strVAl & "'", SqlConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function CheckBlowerDuplicated(strScanDAta As String) As Boolean

        Dim FlagReturn As Boolean = False
        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where S50_BLOWER_SERIAL = '" & strScanDAta & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            FlagReturn = True
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseSql()

        If FlagDuplicateCheck Then
            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then
                Return False
            Else
                Return FlagReturn
            End If
        Else
            Return False
        End If

    End Function

        If FlagDuplicateCheck Then

            Else

            End If
        Else

    End Function

    Private Sub Save_DB_Rework(Serial As String)

        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & Serial & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            tmp = Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value
            tmp = CStr(CInt(tmp) + 1)
            Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value = tmp
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseSql()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        ' D_Value LED 업데이트
        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Try
                If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
                Else
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & " Filled-50")
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Next i

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
            InitControl()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            InitControl()
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000000")
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
                TIMER_COUNT = 0
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                'Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                'frmimage.Close()
                wStep = 1 '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"
                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
                    wStep = 10
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then

            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    wStep = 10
                Else
                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
                    'Panel_Before.Text = "OK"
                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
                            'wStep = 10
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")s
                            'wStep = 10
                            REWORK_STOP = True
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))

                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 10
                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"

            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY") = True Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Warmer.Text = "WARMER" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 7, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Undertray.Text = "UNDERTRAY" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 8, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Can.Text = "CAN" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 9, 1) = "2"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
            IMAGE_PART = Panel_PartNo.Text
            wStep = 4.1

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(6) = 1 Or PLC_VALUE(6) = 2 Then
                wStep = 4.9
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.9 Then

            If REWORK_STOP = True Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9
            Else
                wStep = 5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("SEMI") = True And Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY") = True Then
                toolstep = 1000
                wStep = 7
            Else
                ' HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 조합으로 CurrentToolP 결정
                Dim isLH As Boolean = (Panel_Position.Text = "LH")
                Dim isKY As Boolean = Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("KY")

                If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                    If isLH Then
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_QY
                    Else
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_QY
                    End If
                    If Tool1UseCheck <> False Then
                        toolstep = 100
                        pos1.Text = CurrentToolP(0)
                        pos2.Text = CurrentToolP(1)
                        pos3.Text = CurrentToolP(2)
                        pos4.Text = CurrentToolP(3)
                        pos5.Text = CurrentToolP(4)
                        wStep = 6
                    Else
                        toolstep = 1000
                        wStep = 7
                    End If
                ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                    If isLH Then
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = NHgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = NHgt_LH_QY
                    Else
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = NHgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = NHgt_RH_QY
                    End If
                    toolstep = 10
                    pos1.Text = CurrentToolP(0)
                    pos2.Text = CurrentToolP(1)
                    pos3.Text = CurrentToolP(2)
                    pos4.Text = CurrentToolP(3)
                    pos5.Text = CurrentToolP(4)
                    wStep = 6
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then 'TOOL - toolstep 기반 IO 조건 확인
            ' toolstep=1000이면 모든 TQ 완료
            If toolstep = 1000 Then
                wStep = 7
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            If (Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK") Or
               (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK") Then
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            If (Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA") And
                        (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA") Then
                Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text)
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(7) = 1 Then
                wStep = 10
            Else
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000000")
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            InitControl()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub
    Private Sub Check_BEFORE(strSN As String)

        ConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & strSN & "'", SqlConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                Panel_Before.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S40_DECISION").Value)
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_Before.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try


            Try
                If Trim(Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value) = "0" Then
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK"
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then

                Try
                    Panel_Now.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S50_DECISION").Value)
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Catch ex As Exception
                    Panel_Now.Text = "NG"
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Red
                End Try

            End If

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseSql()

    End Sub

    ' IO 조건 확인 함수 ("번호_ON/번호_OFF" 형식)
    Private Function CheckIOCondition(str As String) As Boolean
        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(str) Then Return True

        Dim conditions() As String = str.Split("/"c)

        For Each cond As String In conditions
            cond = cond.Trim()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cond) Then Continue For

            Dim parts() As String = cond.Split("_"c)
            If parts.Length <> 2 Then Return False

            Dim ioNumber As Integer
            If Not Integer.TryParse(parts(0), ioNumber) Then Return False

            Dim expectedValue As Integer
            If parts(1).ToUpper() = "ON" Then
                expectedValue = 1
            ElseIf parts(1).ToUpper() = "OFF" Then
                expectedValue = 0
            Else
                Return False
            End If

            If ioNumber < 0 OrElse ioNumber >= D_Value.Length Then Return False

            If D_Value(ioNumber) <> expectedValue Then
                Return False
            End If
        Next

        Return True
    End Function
    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New Mutex(True, "Name", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        ExecuteQurryMDB("ALTER TABLE Table_basic ADD FlagDuplicateCheck BIT")

        ' ACT_PLC1 ActiveX 컨트롤 코드로 생성 (디자이너 오류 방지)
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Enabled = True
        ACT_PLC1.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(1384, 5)
        ACT_PLC1.Name = "ACT_PLC1"
        ACT_PLC1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(32, 32)
        Panel6.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        gConnectionOpenSql()
        Dim i As Short
        LoadBasicData()
        InitControl()

        FLag_ONOFF = False
        Control_2_Arry()

        'INI 파일에서 툴 IO 조건 로드 (HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 8가지 조합)
        Dim iniSections() As String = {"TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "TOOL_HGT_LH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "TOOL_HGT_RH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY", "TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY"}

        If Not System.IO.File.Exists(iniFilePath) Then
            'INI 파일 신규 생성
            Dim sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(iniFilePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            sw.WriteLine("[SET]")
            sw.WriteLine("DuplicatedCheck=0")
            sw.WriteLine("")
            For Each sec As String In iniSections
                sw.WriteLine("[" & sec & "]")
                sw.WriteLine("P1=")
                sw.WriteLine("P2=")
                sw.WriteLine("P3=")
                sw.WriteLine("P4=")
                sw.WriteLine("P5=")
                sw.WriteLine("")
            Next
            sw.Close()
        Else
            '기존 파일에 없는 섹션만 추가
            Dim fileContent As String = System.IO.File.ReadAllText(iniFilePath, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            For Each sec As String In iniSections
                If Not fileContent.Contains("[" & sec & "]") Then
                    Dim sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(iniFilePath, True, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                    sw.WriteLine("")
                    sw.WriteLine("[" & sec & "]")
                    sw.WriteLine("P1=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P2=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P3=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P4=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P5=")
                    sw.Close()
                End If
            Next
        End If

        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        '8가지 조합 IO 조건 로드
        Hgt_LH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P3", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P4", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P5", "")

        Hgt_LH_KY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P3", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P4", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P5", "")

        Hgt_RH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P3", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P4", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P5", "")

        Hgt_RH_KY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_KY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_RH_KY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_KY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_RH_KY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_KY", "P3", "")
        Hgt_RH_KY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_KY", "P4", "")
        Hgt_RH_KY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_KY", "P5", "")

        NHgt_LH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "P1", "")
        NHgt_LH_QY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "P2", "")
        NHgt_LH_QY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "P3", "")
        NHgt_LH_QY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "P4", "")
        NHgt_LH_QY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "P5", "")

        NHgt_LH_KY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY", "P1", "")
        NHgt_LH_KY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY", "P2", "")
        NHgt_LH_KY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY", "P3", "")
        NHgt_LH_KY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY", "P4", "")
        NHgt_LH_KY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY", "P5", "")

        NHgt_RH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY", "P1", "")

        NHgt_RH_QY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY", "P4", "")
        NHgt_RH_QY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY", "P5", "")

        NHgt_RH_KY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY", "P4", "")
        NHgt_RH_KY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY", "P5", "")

        '모듈 출력 초기화
        D_OutString = "S00000000E"

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        Address_Connection_PLC1 = "192.168.0.10"
        Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
        LoadPortData()

        SerialOpen()
        LabelNameing()
        Recv_Count = 0

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect.Start()

        Tmr_Work.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work.Start()

        If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True Or Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
            ' 모듈 출력 초기값 전송
            Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)
        End If

        For i = 1 To 8
            SHAPE_W(i) = 45
            SHAPE_H(i) = 45
        Next

        Tool_Ready = True

        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0050", "000000000")

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask3()
        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True

            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else

                    RecvString.Append(Incoming)

                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then

                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then

                            D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 2, 1))
                            D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 3, 1))
                            D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 4, 1))
                            D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 5, 1))

                            D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 6, 1))
                            D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 7, 1))
                            D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 8, 1))
                            D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 9, 1))

                            D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 10, 1))
                            D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 11, 1))
                            D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 12, 1))
                            D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 13, 1))

                            D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 14, 1))
                            D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 15, 1))
                            D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 16, 1))
                            D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 17, 1))

                        End If

                    End If

                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try


        Loop
    End Sub

Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text

Module Module1

    Public iniFilePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "setting.ini"

    Public FlagDuplicateCheck As Boolean

    Public password As String
    Public Tool1UseCheck As Boolean

    Public AIR_TOOL_COUNT As Integer

    Public OPTION_TOOL As Boolean

    Public PlcDw(0 To 10000) As Integer

    Public PlcInStartAddress As Integer
    Public PlcOutStartAddress As Integer

    Public LockBoltTool_Max As Double
    Public LockBoltTool_Min As Double
    Public LockBoltTool_Unit As Double

    Public Tool1_Max As Double
    Public Tool1_Min As Double
    Public Tool1_Unit As Double

    Public Tool2_Max As Double
    Public Tool2_Min As Double
    Public Tool2_Unit As Double

    Public PortNumber_Rfid As String
    Public PortNumber_Scanner As String
    Public PortNumber_Printer As String
    Public PortNumber_Tool1 As String
    Public PortNumber_Tool2 As String
    Public PortNumber_LockBoltTool As String
    Public PortNumber_Module As String

    Public SqlConnect As ADODB.Connection
    Public MdbConnect As ADODB.Connection

    Public D_Value(0 To 16) As Integer
    Public D_OutString As String

    Public Sub ExecuteQurryMDB(ByVal strQurry As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            MdbConnect.Execute(strQurry)
        Catch ex As Exception
            'MsgBox(ex.ToString)
        End Try
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub ConnectionOpenMDB()

        MdbConnect = New ADODB.Connection
        MdbConnect.ConnectionString = _
                "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
        MdbConnect.Open()

    End Sub

    Public Sub ConnectionCloseMDB()

        MdbConnect.Close()

    End Sub

    Public Sub LoadBasicData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Tool1_Max = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MAX").Value)
            Tool1_Min = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MIN").Value)
            Tool1_Unit = Rs.Fields("TOOL1_unit").Value

            Tool2_Max = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL2_MAX").Value)
            Tool2_Min = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL2_MIN").Value)
            Tool2_Unit = Rs.Fields("TOOL2_unit").Value

            LockBoltTool_Max = CDbl(Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_MAX").Value)
            LockBoltTool_Min = CDbl(Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_MIN").Value)
            LockBoltTool_Unit = Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_UNIT").Value

            PlcInStartAddress = CInt(Rs.Fields("plcinstartaddress").Value)
            PlcOutStartAddress = CInt(Rs.Fields("plcoutstartaddress").Value)

            AIR_TOOL_COUNT = CInt(Rs.Fields("AIR_TOOL_COUNT").Value)

            Tool1UseCheck = Rs.Fields("Tool1UseCheck").Value
            FlagDuplicateCheck = Rs.Fields("FlagDuplicateCheck").Value

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub SaveBasicData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MAX").Value = CStr(Tool1_Max)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MIN").Value = CStr(Tool1_Min)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL1_UNIT").Value = Tool1_Unit

            Rs.Fields("TOOL2_MAX").Value = CStr(Tool2_Max)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL2_MIN").Value = CStr(Tool2_Min)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL2_UNIT").Value = Tool2_Unit

            Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_MAX").Value = CStr(LockBoltTool_Max)
            Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_MIN").Value = CStr(LockBoltTool_Min)
            Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool_UNIT").Value = LockBoltTool_Unit

            Rs.Fields("plcInstartaddress").Value = CStr(PlcInStartAddress)
            Rs.Fields("plcOutstartaddress").Value = CStr(PlcOutStartAddress)

            Rs.Fields("AIR_TOOL_COUNT").Value = CStr(AIR_TOOL_COUNT)

            Rs.Fields("Tool1UseCheck").Value = Tool1UseCheck
            Rs.Fields("FlagDuplicateCheck").Value = FlagDuplicateCheck

            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub LoadPortData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_SerialPort", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            PortNumber_Rfid = Rs.Fields("RFID").Value
            PortNumber_Scanner = Rs.Fields("SCANNER").Value
            PortNumber_Printer = Rs.Fields("Printer").Value
            PortNumber_Module = Rs.Fields("Module").Value
            PortNumber_Tool1 = Rs.Fields("Tool1").Value
            PortNumber_Tool2 = Rs.Fields("Tool2").Value
            PortNumber_LockBoltTool = Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool").Value
            password = Rs.Fields("PASSWORD").Value
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub SavePortData()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_SerialPort", MdbConnect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Fields("RFID").Value = PortNumber_Rfid
            Rs.Fields("SCANNER").Value = PortNumber_Scanner
            Rs.Fields("Printer").Value = PortNumber_Printer
            Rs.Fields("Module").Value = PortNumber_Module
            Rs.Fields("Tool1").Value = PortNumber_Tool1
            Rs.Fields("Tool2").Value = PortNumber_Tool2
            Rs.Fields("LockBoltTool").Value = PortNumber_LockBoltTool
            Rs.Fields("PASSWORD").Value = password
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Sub ConnectionOpenSql()

        'Dim connection_string As String
        'SqlConnect = New ADODB.Connection
        'connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.100;Initial Catalog=FTECH_SVR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        'SqlConnect.ConnectionString = connection_string
        'SqlConnect.Open()

    End Sub

    Sub ConnectionCloseSql()

        'SqlConnect.Close()

    End Sub

    Sub gConnectionOpenSql()

        Dim connection_string As String
        SqlConnect = New ADODB.Connection
        connection_string = "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=FTECH_SVR;Initial Catalog=FTECH_SVR;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,"

        SqlConnect.ConnectionString = connection_string
        SqlConnect.Open()

    End Sub

    Sub gConnectionCloseSql()

        SqlConnect.Close()

    End Sub

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String

        Dim hexv As String, na As Long

        hexv = ""
        Do While DecNum > 0

            na = DecNum Mod 16

            Select Case na
                Case 10
                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 11
                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 12
                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 13
                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 14
                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 15
                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                Case Else
                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
            End Select
            If DecNum >= 16 Then
                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
            Else
                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop

        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
        Else
            Dec2Hex = hexv
        End If
    End Function

    ' INI 파일 읽기/쓰기 클래스
    Public Class IniFile
        Private path As String

        Public Sub New(path As String)
            Me.path = path
        End Sub

        <DllImport("kernel32")>
        Private Shared Function GetPrivateProfileString(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String, retVal As StringBuilder, size As Integer, filePath As String) As Integer
        End Function

        <DllImport("kernel32")>
        Private Shared Function WritePrivateProfileString(section As String, key As String, value As String, filePath As String) As Integer
        End Function

        Public Function ReadValue(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String) As String
            Dim retVal As New StringBuilder(255)
            GetPrivateProfileString(section, key, defaultValue, retVal, 255, path)
            Return retVal.ToString()
        End Function

        Public Sub WriteValue(section As String, key As String, value As String)
            WritePrivateProfileString(section, key, value, path)
        End Sub
    End Class

End Module

Public Class FrmBasic

    Public Sub New()

        ' 이 호출은 디자이너에 필요합니다.
        InitializeComponent()
        LoadTextBox()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadTextBox()

        TextBox1.Text = CStr(Tool1_Max)
        TextBox2.Text = CStr(Tool1_Min)
        TextBox3.Text = Tool1_Unit

        TextBox4.Text = CStr(Tool2_Max)
        TextBox5.Text = CStr(Tool2_Min)
        TextBox6.Text = Tool2_Unit

        TextBox7.Text = CStr(LockBoltTool_Max)
        TextBox8.Text = CStr(LockBoltTool_Min)
        TextBox9.Text = LockBoltTool_Unit

        TextBox10.Text = CStr(PlcInStartAddress)
        TextBox11.Text = CStr(PlcOutStartAddress)

        TextBox12.Text = CStr(AIR_TOOL_COUNT)

        chkTool1UseCheck.Checked = Tool1UseCheck

        CheckBox1.Checked = FlagDuplicateCheck

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click

        Tool1_Max = CDbl(TextBox1.Text)
        Tool1_Min = CDbl(TextBox2.Text)
        Tool1_Unit = TextBox3.Text

        Tool2_Max = CDbl(TextBox4.Text)
        Tool2_Min = CDbl(TextBox5.Text)
        Tool2_Unit = TextBox6.Text

        LockBoltTool_Max = CDbl(TextBox7.Text)
        LockBoltTool_Min = CDbl(TextBox8.Text)
        LockBoltTool_Unit = TextBox9.Text

        PlcInStartAddress = CInt(TextBox10.Text)
        PlcOutStartAddress = CInt(TextBox11.Text)

        AIR_TOOL_COUNT = CInt(TextBox12.Text)

        Tool1UseCheck = chkTool1UseCheck.Checked

        FlagDuplicateCheck = CheckBox1.Checked

        SaveBasicData()

    End Sub

End Class

Public Class FrmPort

    Public Sub New()

        ' 이 호출은 디자이너에 필요합니다.
        InitializeComponent()
        Init_ComboBox()
        Port_2_ComboBox()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

    End Sub

    Private Sub Port_2_ComboBox()

        ComboBox1.Text = PortNumber_RFID
        ComboBox2.Text = PortNumber_SCANNER
        ComboBox3.Text = PortNumber_Printer
        ComboBox4.Text = PortNumber_Module
        ComboBox5.Text = PortNumber_Tool1
        ComboBox6.Text = PortNumber_Tool2
        ComboBox7.Text = PortNumber_LockBoltTool

    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_ComboBox()

        For i As Integer = 1 To 15
            ComboBox1.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBox2.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBox3.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBox4.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBox5.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBox6.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBox7.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
        Next

        ComboBox1.Items.Add("NONE")
        ComboBox2.Items.Add("NONE")
        ComboBox3.Items.Add("NONE")
        ComboBox4.Items.Add("NONE")
        ComboBox5.Items.Add("NONE")
        ComboBox6.Items.Add("NONE")
        ComboBox7.Items.Add("NONE")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click

        PortNumber_RFID = ComboBox1.Text
        PortNumber_SCANNER = ComboBox2.Text
        PortNumber_Printer = ComboBox3.Text
        PortNumber_Module = ComboBox4.Text
        PortNumber_Tool1 = ComboBox5.Text
        PortNumber_Tool2 = ComboBox6.Text
        PortNumber_LockBoltTool = ComboBox7.Text

        SavePortData()
        FrmMain.SerialOpen()
        Me.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

End Class

Public Class FrmToolPos

    Private ReadOnly SpecNames As String() = {
        "HGT_LH_KY", "HGT_LH_QY", "HGT_RH_KY", "HGT_RH_QY",
        "NHGT_LH_KY", "NHGT_LH_QY", "NHGT_RH_KY", "NHGT_RH_QY"
    }

    Private currentImage As Image = Nothing
    Private txtX(4) As TextBox
    Private txtY(4) As TextBox
    Private rdoP(4) As RadioButton

    Public Sub New()
        InitializeComponent()
    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmToolPos_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        ' TextBox/RadioButton 배열 먼저 연결 (SelectedIndex 설정 전에 해야 함)
        txtX(0) = txtP1X : txtY(0) = txtP1Y : rdoP(0) = rdoP1
        txtX(1) = txtP2X : txtY(1) = txtP2Y : rdoP(1) = rdoP2
        txtX(2) = txtP3X : txtY(2) = txtP3Y : rdoP(2) = rdoP3
        txtX(3) = txtP4X : txtY(3) = txtP4Y : rdoP(3) = rdoP4
        txtX(4) = txtP5X : txtY(4) = txtP5Y : rdoP(4) = rdoP5
        rdoP1.Checked = True

        For Each s As String In SpecNames
            cboSpec.Items.Add(s)
        Next
        cboSpec.SelectedIndex = 0
    End Sub

    Private Sub cboSpec_SelectedIndexChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles cboSpec.SelectedIndexChanged
        LoadSpec()
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadSpec()
        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        Dim section As String = "POS_" & SpecNames(cboSpec.SelectedIndex)

        ' 이미지 로드
        Dim imgPath As String = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "ImagePath", "")
        txtImagePath.Text = imgPath
        SetImage(imgPath)

        ' 좌표 로드
        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
            txtX(i).Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "X", "0")
            txtY(i).Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "Y", "0")
        Next

        ' 원 크기
        txtCircleSize.Text = iniFile.ReadValue(section, "CircleSize", "30")

        picPreview.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    Private Sub SetImage(imgPath As String)
        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
            currentImage.Dispose()
            currentImage = Nothing
        End If
        If System.IO.File.Exists(imgPath) Then
            currentImage = Image.FromFile(imgPath)
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnSelectImage_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSelectImage.Click
        Using dlg As New OpenFileDialog()
            dlg.Filter = "Image Files|*.bmp;*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.gif|All Files|*.*"
            dlg.Title = "Select Image File"
            If dlg.ShowDialog() = DialogResult.OK Then
                txtImagePath.Text = dlg.FileName
                SetImage(dlg.FileName)
                picPreview.Invalidate()
            End If
        End Using
    End Sub

    ' 이미지 클릭 → 선택된 P 좌표 설정 후 다음 P로 이동
    Private Sub picPreview_MouseClick(sender As Object, e As MouseEventArgs) Handles picPreview.MouseClick
        If currentImage Is Nothing Then Return

        ' picPreview 화면 좌표 → 이미지 원본 좌표 변환
        Dim imgX As Integer = CInt(e.X * currentImage.Width / picPreview.Width)
        Dim imgY As Integer = CInt(e.Y * currentImage.Height / picPreview.Height)

        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
            If rdoP(i).Checked Then
                txtX(i).Text = imgX.ToString()
                txtY(i).Text = imgY.ToString()
                ' 다음 P로 자동 이동
                If i < 4 Then rdoP(i + 1).Checked = True
                Exit For
            End If
        Next

        picPreview.Invalidate()
    End Sub

    Private Sub picPreview_Paint(sender As Object, e As PaintEventArgs) Handles picPreview.Paint
        Dim g As Graphics = e.Graphics

        ' 이미지 그리기 (StretchImage)
        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
            g.DrawImage(currentImage, picPreview.ClientRectangle)
        End If

        ' 원 크기 / 글자 크기 (비율 자동 추종)
        Dim circleSize As Integer = 30
        Integer.TryParse(txtCircleSize.Text, circleSize)
        If circleSize < 10 Then circleSize = 10
        Dim fontSize As Single = Math.Max(6, circleSize * 0.4F)

        ' 이미지 원본 → 화면 스케일
        Dim scaleX As Single = 1.0F
        Dim scaleY As Single = 1.0F
        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then
            scaleX = CSng(picPreview.Width) / currentImage.Width
            scaleY = CSng(picPreview.Height) / currentImage.Height
        End If

        Using brushBlack As New SolidBrush(Color.Black)
            Using brushWhite As New SolidBrush(Color.White)
                Using penWhite As New Pen(Color.White, 1)
                    Using fnt As New Font("Arial", fontSize, FontStyle.Bold)
                        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
                            Dim px As Integer = 0
                            Dim py As Integer = 0
                            Integer.TryParse(txtX(i).Text, px)
                            Integer.TryParse(txtY(i).Text, py)

                            Dim sx As Integer = CInt(px * scaleX)
                            Dim sy As Integer = CInt(py * scaleY)

                            Dim rect As New Rectangle(sx - circleSize \ 2, sy - circleSize \ 2, circleSize, circleSize)
                            g.FillEllipse(brushBlack, rect)
                            g.DrawEllipse(penWhite, rect)

                            Dim numStr As String = CStr(i + 1)
                            Dim strSize As SizeF = g.MeasureString(numStr, fnt)
                            g.DrawString(numStr, fnt, brushWhite,
                    sx - strSize.Width / 2,
                    sy - strSize.Height / 2)
                        Next
                    End Using
                End Using
            End Using
        End Using
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnSave.Click
        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        Dim section As String = "POS_" & SpecNames(cboSpec.SelectedIndex)

        iniFile.WriteValue(section, "ImagePath", txtImagePath.Text)
        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
            iniFile.WriteValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "X", txtX(i).Text)
            iniFile.WriteValue(section, "P" & (i + 1) & "Y", txtY(i).Text)
        Next
        iniFile.WriteValue(section, "CircleSize", txtCircleSize.Text)

        MessageBox.Show("Saved successfully.", "Info", MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Information)
    End Sub

    Private Sub btnClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnClose.Click
        If currentImage IsNot Nothing Then currentImage.Dispose()
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    ' 좌표/원크기 변경 시 미리보기 실시간 갱신
    Private Sub txtCoord_TextChanged(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) _
        Handles txtP1X.TextChanged, txtP1Y.TextChanged,
                txtP2X.TextChanged, txtP2Y.TextChanged,
                txtP3X.TextChanged, txtP3Y.TextChanged,
                txtP4X.TextChanged, txtP4Y.TextChanged,
                txtP5X.TextChanged, txtP5Y.TextChanged,
                txtCircleSize.TextChanged
        picPreview.Invalidate()
    End Sub

End Class

content.text:
## S50 프로젝트 구조 분석

**프로젝트**: VB.NET WinForms (.NET Framework 4.8), Mitsubishi PLC (QnUDE) TCP 통신

### 핵심 설정 부분

**1. FrmToolPos (Tool Position 설정폼)**
- 8개 사양 조합: `HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × KY/QY`
- 사양별 5개 좌표점 (P1~P5) + 이미지 경로 + 원 크기
- 이미지 클릭으로 좌표 설정, 실시간 미리보기
- `setting.ini` 파일에 섹션별 저장 (`[POS_HGT_LH_KY]` 등)

**2. IniFile 클래스** (`Module1.vb:303~327`)
- `kernel32` DLL Import 방식으로 INI 읽기/쓰기

**3. FrmMain 내 IO 조건 배열** (라인 85~93)
- `Hgt_LH_QY(4)`, `Hgt_RH_KY(4)` 등 8개 배열
- `CurrentToolP()` — 현재 선택된 제품의 IO 조건
- `toolstep` — 툴 스텝 상태

**4. 기존 설정 (MDB 기반)**
- `FrmBasic` — Tool 상/하한, Unit, PLC 주소, Air Tool Count
- `FrmPort` — 시리얼 포트 7개 (RFID, Scanner, Printer, Module, Tool1/2, LockBoltTool)
- `Module1` — ADODB 기반 MDB 연결/저장

### KY FRT CUSH 솔루션 내 다른 프로그램
S10, S20, S30, S40, **S50**, S60, S90, ST10, ST60, ST70, ST80(L), ST80(R) 등

---

어떤 프로그램들에 S50의 어떤 설정을 적용할 건가요? (FrmToolPos + IniFile 전체? 아니면 특정 부분만?)

                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1A") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(ByVal str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
        End If

                        lblTagData.Text = RFID_Tag_Data

    Sub SerialOpen()
        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try

            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)

        End Try

        Try

            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.Close()
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
                Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Tool1.Open()
                Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Else
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
                Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Tool1.Open()
            End If

            Tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            Tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)

        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicated(strcolName As String, strVAl As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where " & strcolName & " = '" & strVAl & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Public Sub New()

        ' 이 호출은 디자이너에 필요합니다.
        InitializeComponent()


        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New Mutex(True, "Name", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        gConSTring = iniFile.ReadValue("SVR", "ConString", "")
        Dim tmp As String = iniFile.ReadValue("SET", "DuplicatedCheck", "")
        If tmp = "1" Then
            FlagDuplicatedCheck = True
        Else
            FlagDuplicatedCheck = False
        End If


        gConnection_Open()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        Dim i As Short
        Dim nCnt As Integer
        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim nameBuf As New VB6.FixedLengthString(64)
        Dim comName As String
        hReader = 0 'set reader handle to NULL
        hTag = 0 ' set tag handle to null
        RDR_LoadReaderDrivers(0) 'load rfidlib_ANM201.dll or other drivers

        nCnt = COMPort_Enum()
        For i = 0 To (nCnt - 1)
            iret = COMPort_GetEnumItem(i, nameBuf.Value, 64)
            If iret = 0 Then
                'UPGRADE_ISSUE: vbFromUnicode 상수가 업그레이드되지 않았습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="55B59875-9A95-4B71-9D6A-7C294BF7139D"'
                'comName = StrConv(nameBuf.Value, vbFromUnicode)
                Dim codepage As Integer = System.Globalization.CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.TextInfo.ANSICodePage
                Dim convertBytes() As Byte = Encoding.GetEncoding(codepage).GetBytes(nameBuf.Value)
                comName = System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(convertBytes)
            End If
        Next

        Init_Control()
        FLag_ONOFF = False
