    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar

                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String1) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection1 = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0061" Then

                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            'abel_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                            lblToolValue.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                            If wStep = 6 Then

                                If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    Panel_TQ1.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                    TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                                    wStep = 6.1
                                Else

                                End If

                            ElseIf wStep = 6.2 Then

                                If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    Panel_TQ2.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                    Panel_TQ2_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                    Panel_TQ2_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                    TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                                    wStep = 6.3
                                Else

                                End If

                            ElseIf wStep = 6.4 Then

                                If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    Panel_TQ3.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                    Panel_TQ3_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                    TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                                    wStep = 6.5
                                Else

                                End If

                            ElseIf wStep = 6.6 Then

                                If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    Panel_TQ4.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                    Panel_TQ4_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                    TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                                    wStep = 6.7
                                Else

                                End If

                            ElseIf wStep = 6.8 Then

                                If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    Panel_TQ5.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                    Panel_TQ5_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                    TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                                    wStep = 6.9
                                Else

                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String1 = ""
                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String1 = Tool_String1 & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop



    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT_1()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ_1()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ_1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 10

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "W0400" & vbLf &
                                "W0401" & vbLf &
                                "W0450" & vbLf &
                                "W0451" & vbLf &
                                "W0452" & vbLf &
                                "W0453" & vbLf &
                                "W0454" & vbLf &
                                "W0455" & vbLf &
                                "W0456" & vbLf &
                                "W0457"



        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(0)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(1)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(2)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PLC_VALUE(4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PLC_VALUE(5)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PLC_VALUE(6)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PLC_VALUE(7)

            For j = 0 To 1
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT_1()

        ACT_PLC1.ActSourceNetworkNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActSourceStationNumber = 2
        ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 211

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = Address_Connection_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
        Else
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_Part(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            Panel_PartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            Panel_PartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Panel_CarType.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Option_CarType").Value)
            Panel_Position.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Option_LHRH").Value)

            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)
            If Rs.Fields("OPtion_HGT").Value = True Then
                Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT"
            Else
                Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT"
                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If
            If Rs.Fields("Option_VENT").Value = True Then
                Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT"
            Else
                Panel_Vent.Text = "-"
            End If
            If Trim(Rs.Fields("VENT_SERIAL").Value) = "0" Then
                TargetBlower.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
            Else
                OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE = Trim(Rs.Fields("VENT_SERIAL").Value)
                TargetBlower.Text = OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = ""
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = ""
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
            End If
            wStep = 4
            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_DB_Rework(Serial As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & Serial & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            tmp = Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value
            tmp = CStr(CInt(tmp) + 1)
            Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value = tmp
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
            Init_Control()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            Init_Control()
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000")
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
                TIMER_COUNT = 0
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                'frmimage.Close()
                wStep = 1 '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000"
                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
                    wStep = 10
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then

            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    wStep = 10
                Else
                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
                            'wStep = 10
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                            'wStep = 10
                            REWORK_STOP = True
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))

                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 10
                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000"

            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_CarType.Text = "SP2i" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            Else
            End If
            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
            IMAGE_PART = Panel_PartNo.Text
            wStep = 4.1

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(6) = 1 Then
                wStep = 4.9
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.9 Then

            If REWORK_STOP = True Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9.1
            Else
                wStep = 5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("SEMI") Then
                Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                wStep = 6
            Else
                If Panel_CarType.Text.ToUpper.Contains("SP3I") = True Then
                    If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "PASS"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Black
                        TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                        wStep = 6
                    Else
                        wStep = 9
                    End If
                Else
                    If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                        If Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA" Then
                            TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                            wStep = 6
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 9
                    End If
                End If
            End If


        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then 'TOOL


        ElseIf wStep = 6.1 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.2

        ElseIf wStep = 6.3 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.4

        ElseIf wStep = 6.5 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.6

        ElseIf wStep = 6.7 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.8

        ElseIf wStep = 6.9 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            If (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA") Then
                Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text)
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9.1

            End If
        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(7) = 1 Then
                wStep = 10
            Else
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000")
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            Init_Control()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_BEFORE(strSN As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & strSN & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                Panel_Before.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S40_DECISION").Value)
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_Before.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try

            Try
                If Trim(Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value) = "0" Then
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK"
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then

                Try
                    Panel_Now.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S50_DECISION").Value)
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Catch ex As Exception
                    Panel_Now.Text = "NG"
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Red
                End Try

            End If

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        Mid$(D_OutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "1"
        LED_OUT(num1).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(num1) & " Filled-50")

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        Mid$(D_OutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "0"
        LED_OUT(num1).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(num1) & "-50")

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()
        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)
    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

            End If

        ElseIf Tool_Connection1 = True Then

            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            End If

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim scandata As String
        Dim Incoming As String
        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        scandata = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text

        '        첫자리 LH, RH
        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력


        'S50_PUMP_SERIAL/BLOWER_BARCODE

        If wStep = 5 Then

            Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text

            If FlagDuplicatedCheck = True Then

                If CheckDuplicated("S50_PUMP_SERIAL", scandata) = True Then
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "L" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "R" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                    If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "L" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If
                ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                    If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "R" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        End If

        If wStep = 9 Then
            If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then

                If FlagDuplicatedCheck = True Then

                    If CheckDuplicated("BLOWER_BARCODE", scandata) = True Then
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    End If
                Else
                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                    Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                    Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If
            Else
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

   267→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   268→
   269→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   270→
   271→        hexv = ""
   272→        Do While DecNum > 0
   273→
   274→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   275→
   276→            Select Case na
   277→                Case 10
   278→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   279→                Case 11
   280→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   281→                Case 12
   282→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   283→                Case 13
   284→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   285→                Case 14
   286→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   287→                Case 15
   288→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   289→                Case Else
   290→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   291→            End Select
   292→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   293→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   294→            Else
   295→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   296→                Exit Do
   297→            End If

Imports System.Text
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices

Module Module1

    Public iniFilePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "setting.ini"
    Public gConSTring As String

    Public Class IniFile

        Private path As String
        Public Sub New(path As String)
            Me.path = path
        End Sub
        <DllImport("kernel32")>
        Private Shared Function GetPrivateProfileString(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String, retVal As StringBuilder, size As Integer, filePath As String) As Integer
        End Function
        <DllImport("kernel32")>
        Private Shared Function WritePrivateProfileString(section As String, key As String, value As String, filePath As String) As Integer
        End Function
        Public Function ReadValue(section As String, key As String, defaultValue As String) As String
            Dim retVal As New StringBuilder(255)
            GetPrivateProfileString(section, key, defaultValue, retVal, 255, path)
            Return retVal.ToString()
        End Function
        Public Sub WriteValue(section As String, key As String, value As String)
            WritePrivateProfileString(section, key, value, path)
        End Sub

    End Class

    Public LINE_POSITION As String
    Public TOOL1_MAX As Double
    Public TOOL1_MIN As Double
    Public Unit As String

    Public OPTION_TOOL As Boolean

    Public password As String

    Public PortNumber_RFID As String
    Public PortNumber_SCANNER As String
    Public PortNumber_Module As String
    Public PortNumber_LockBolt As String
    Public PortNumber_TOOL1 As String

    Public Sql_Connect As ADODB.Connection
    Public Mdb_Connect As ADODB.Connection
    Public D_OutString As String
    Public D_Value(0 To 16) As Integer

    Public Sub Connection_Open_MDB()

        Mdb_Connect = New ADODB.Connection
        Mdb_Connect.ConnectionString =
                "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
        Mdb_Connect.Open()

    End Sub

    Public Sub Connection_Close_MDB()

        Mdb_Connect.Close()

    End Sub

    Public Sub Load_Basic_Data()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            TOOL1_MAX = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MAX").Value)
            TOOL1_MIN = CDbl(Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MIN").Value)

            Unit = CStr(Rs.Fields("UNIT").Value)

            OPTION_TOOL = Rs.Fields("OPTION_TOOL").Value

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub Load_Etc_Data()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Etc", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            LINE_POSITION = CStr(Rs.Fields("LINE_POSITION").Value)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub Save_Basic_Data()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Basic", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MAX").Value = CStr(TOOL1_MAX)
            Rs.Fields("TOOL1_MIN").Value = CStr(TOOL1_MIN)

            Rs.Fields("UNIT").Value = Unit

            Rs.Fields("OPTION_TOOL").Value = OPTION_TOOL

            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()
    End Sub


    Public Sub Load_Port_Data()

        Connection_Open_MDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_SerialPort", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            PortNumber_RFID = Rs.Fields("RFID").Value
            PortNumber_TOOL1 = Rs.Fields("TOOL").Value
            PortNumber_LockBolt = Rs.Fields("LOCKBOLT").Value
            PortNumber_SCANNER = Rs.Fields("SCANNER").Value
            password = Rs.Fields("PASSWORD").Value
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub Save_Port_Data()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_SerialPort", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Fields("RFID").Value = PortNumber_RFID
            Rs.Fields("TOOL").Value = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Rs.Fields("LOCKBOLT").Value = PortNumber_LockBolt
            Rs.Fields("SCANNER").Value = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Rs.Fields("PASSWORD").Value = password
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub
    Public Sub Save_Password_Data()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_SerialPort", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Fields("PASSWORD").Value = password
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub
    Sub Connection_Open()

        'Dim connection_string As String
        'Sql_Connect = New ADODB.Connection
        'connection_string = gConSTring
        'Sql_Connect.ConnectionString = connection_string
        'Sql_Connect.Open()

    End Sub

    Sub Connection_Close()

        'Sql_Connect.Close()

    End Sub

    Sub gConnection_Open()

        Dim connection_string As String
        Sql_Connect = New ADODB.Connection
        connection_string = gConSTring
        Sql_Connect.ConnectionString = connection_string
        Sql_Connect.Open()

    End Sub

    Sub gConnection_Close()

        Sql_Connect.Close()

    End Sub

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String

        Dim hexv As String, na As Long

        hexv = ""
        Do While DecNum > 0

            na = DecNum Mod 16

            Select Case na
                Case 10
                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 11
                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 12
                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 13
                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 14
                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 15
                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                Case Else
                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
            End Select
            If DecNum >= 16 Then
                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
            Else
                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop

        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
        Else
            Dec2Hex = hexv
        End If
    End Function

End Module

        Init_ComboBox()
        Port_2_ComboBox()

    Private Sub Port_2_ComboBox()

        ComboBox1.Text = PortNumber_RFID
        ComboBox3.Text = PortNumber_TOOL1
        ComboBox4.Text = PortNumber_SCANNER

    End Sub

    Private Sub Init_ComboBox()

        For i As Integer = 1 To 15
            ComboBox1.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBox3.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
            ComboBox4.Items.Add("COM" & CStr(i))
        Next

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click

        PortNumber_RFID = ComboBox1.Text
        PortNumber_TOOL1 = ComboBox3.Text
        PortNumber_SCANNER = ComboBox4.Text

        Save_Port_Data()

        FrmMain.SerialOpen()
        Me.Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

End Class

Option Strict Off
Option Explicit On
Module functions

    Public Const GENERIC_READ As Integer = &H80000000
    Public Const GENERIC_WRITE As Integer = &H40000000
    Public Const FILE_SHARE_READ As Integer = &H1
    Public Const FILE_SHARE_WRITE As Integer = &H2
    Public Const OPEN_EXISTING As Short = 3
    Public Const FILE_FLAG_BACKUP_SEMANTICS As Integer = &H2000000
    Public Const INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE As Short = -1

    Public Structure FILETIME
        Dim dwLowDateTime As Integer
        Dim dwHighDateTime As Integer
    End Structure

    Public Structure SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES
        Dim nLength As Integer
        Dim lpSecurityDescriptor As Integer
        Dim bInheritHandle As Integer
    End Structure

    Public Structure WIN32_FIND_DATA
        Dim dwFileAttributes As Integer
        Dim ftCreationTime As FILETIME
        Dim ftLastAccessTime As FILETIME
        Dim ftLastWriteTime As FILETIME
        Dim nFileSizeHigh As Integer
        Dim nFileSizeLow As Integer
        Dim dwReserved0 As Integer
        Dim dwReserved1 As Integer
        'UPGRADE_WARNING: 고정 길이 문자열 크기가 버퍼와 맞아야 합니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="3C1E4426-0B80-443E-B943-0627CD55D48B"'
        <VBFixedString(256), System.Runtime.InteropServices.MarshalAs(System.Runtime.InteropServices.UnmanagedType.ByValArray, SizeConst:=256)> Public cFileName() As Char
        'UPGRADE_WARNING: 고정 길이 문자열 크기가 버퍼와 맞아야 합니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="3C1E4426-0B80-443E-B943-0627CD55D48B"'
        <VBFixedString(14), System.Runtime.InteropServices.MarshalAs(System.Runtime.InteropServices.UnmanagedType.ByValArray, SizeConst:=14)> Public cAlternate() As Char
    End Structure

    'UPGRADE_WARNING: WIN32_FIND_DATA 구조체에는 이 Declare 문에 인수로 전달할 마샬링 특성이 있어야 합니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="C429C3A5-5D47-4CD9-8F51-74A1616405DC"'
    Public Declare Function FindFirstFile Lib "kernel32" Alias "FindFirstFileA" (ByVal lpFileName As String, ByRef lpFindFileData As WIN32_FIND_DATA) As Integer
    Public Declare Function FindClose Lib "kernel32" (ByVal hFindFile As Integer) As Integer
    Public Declare Function GetLogicalDriveStrings Lib "kernel32" Alias "GetLogicalDriveStringsA" (ByVal nBufferLength As Integer, ByVal lpBuffer As String) As Integer

    Public Const CP_UTF8 As Integer = 65001
    Public Declare Function WideCharToMultiByte Lib "kernel32" (ByVal CodePage As Integer, ByVal dwFlags As Integer, ByVal lpWideCharStr As Integer, ByVal cchWideChar As Integer, ByVal lpMultiByteStr As Integer, ByVal cchMultiByte As Integer, ByVal lpDefaultChar As Integer, ByVal lpUsedDefaultChar As Integer) As Integer
    Public Declare Function MultiByteToWideChar Lib "kernel32" (ByVal CodePage As Integer, ByVal dwFlags As Integer, ByVal lpMultiByteStr As Integer, ByVal cbMultiByte As Integer, ByVal lpWideCharStr As Integer, ByVal cchWideChar As Integer) As Integer

    'UPGRADE_ISSUE: 매개 변수를 'As Any'로 선언할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="FAE78A8D-8978-4FD4-8208-5B7324A8F795"'
    'UPGRADE_ISSUE: 매개 변수를 'As Any'로 선언할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="FAE78A8D-8978-4FD4-8208-5B7324A8F795"'
    Private Declare Sub CopyMemory Lib "kernel32" Alias "RtlMoveMemory" (ByRef hpvDest As Long, ByRef hpvSource As Long, ByVal cbCopy As Integer)

    Public hReader As Integer
    Public hTag As Integer
    Public HexMatrix(15, 15) As Byte

    Public Function FileExists(ByRef sSource As String) As Boolean
        On Error Resume Next
        'Thorogh FileExists function
        Dim allDrives As String
        Dim WFD As WIN32_FIND_DATA
        Dim hFile As Integer
        If Right(sSource, 2) = ":\" Then
            allDrives = Space(64)
            Call GetLogicalDriveStrings(Len(allDrives), allDrives)
            FileExists = InStr(1, allDrives, Left(sSource, 1), 1) > 0
            Exit Function
        Else
            If Not sSource = "" Then
                hFile = FindFirstFile(sSource, WFD)
                FileExists = hFile <> INVALID_HANDLE_VALUE
                Call FindClose(hFile)
            Else
                FileExists = False
            End If
        End If
    End Function

    Public Sub AddToLog(ByRef LogData As String, Optional ByRef Opt As Integer = 0)
        Dim FF As Short
        On Error Resume Next

        If Not FileExists(My.Application.Info.DirectoryPath & "\LogData") Then MkDir(My.Application.Info.DirectoryPath & "\LogData")

        Select Case Opt
            Case 0 ' Error LogData
                FF = FreeFile
                'UPGRADE_WARNING: App 속성 App.EXEName에 새 동작이 있습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6BA9B8D2-2A32-4B6E-8D36-44949974A5B4"'
                FileOpen(FF, My.Application.Info.DirectoryPath & "\LogData\" & My.Application.Info.AssemblyName & ".log", OpenMode.Append)
                PrintLine(FF, Now, LogData) : FileClose(FF)
            Case -1 'logdata 삭제
                'UPGRADE_WARNING: App 속성 App.EXEName에 새 동작이 있습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6BA9B8D2-2A32-4B6E-8D36-44949974A5B4"'
                If FileExists(My.Application.Info.DirectoryPath & "\LogData\" & My.Application.Info.AssemblyName & ".log") Then
                    'UPGRADE_WARNING: App 속성 App.EXEName에 새 동작이 있습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6BA9B8D2-2A32-4B6E-8D36-44949974A5B4"'
                    Rename(My.Application.Info.DirectoryPath & "\LogData\" & My.Application.Info.AssemblyName & ".log", My.Application.Info.DirectoryPath & "\LogData\" & Format(Now, "yyMMdd-HHmmss") & ".bak")
                    'Call FileCopy(App.path & "\LogData\" & App.ExeName & ".log", App.path & "\LogData\" & format(Now, "yymmdd-hhmmss") & ".bak")
                    'Kill App.path & "\LogData\" & App.ExeName & ".log"
                End If
            Case Else

        End Select

    End Sub



    Public Function BytesToHex(ByRef bits() As Byte, ByVal size As Short) As String
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim b As Object
        Dim s As String

        If size = 0 Then
            For Each b In bits
                'UPGRADE_WARNING: b 개체의 기본 속성을 확인할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6A50421D-15FE-4896-8A1B-2EC21E9037B2"'
                If b < 16 Then
                    'UPGRADE_WARNING: b 개체의 기본 속성을 확인할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6A50421D-15FE-4896-8A1B-2EC21E9037B2"'
                    s = s & "0" & Hex(b)
                Else
                    'UPGRADE_WARNING: b 개체의 기본 속성을 확인할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6A50421D-15FE-4896-8A1B-2EC21E9037B2"'
                    s = s & Hex(b)
                End If
            Next b
        Else
            For i = 0 To size - 1
                'UPGRADE_WARNING: b 개체의 기본 속성을 확인할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6A50421D-15FE-4896-8A1B-2EC21E9037B2"'
                b = bits(i)
                'UPGRADE_WARNING: b 개체의 기본 속성을 확인할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6A50421D-15FE-4896-8A1B-2EC21E9037B2"'
                If b < 16 Then
                    'UPGRADE_WARNING: b 개체의 기본 속성을 확인할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6A50421D-15FE-4896-8A1B-2EC21E9037B2"'
                    s = s & "0" & Hex(b)
                Else
                    'UPGRADE_WARNING: b 개체의 기본 속성을 확인할 수 없습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="6A50421D-15FE-4896-8A1B-2EC21E9037B2"'
                    s = s & Hex(b)
                End If
            Next
        End If
        BytesToHex = s
    End Function

    'UPGRADE_NOTE: str이(가) str_Renamed(으)로 업그레이드되었습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="A9E4979A-37FA-4718-9994-97DD76ED70A7"'
    Public Function HexToBytes(ByRef str_Renamed As String) As Byte()
        Dim rst() As Byte
        Dim i, j As Integer
        i = Len(str_Renamed)
        j = i \ 2 - 1
        ReDim rst(j)
        For i = 0 To j
            rst(i) = CByte("&H" & Mid(str_Renamed, i + i + 1, 2))
        Next
        HexToBytes = VB6.CopyArray(rst)

    End Function
End Module

    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Dim RFID_Tag_Data As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    Else
                        RFID_Tag_Data = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 26)
                        lblTagData.Text = RFID_Tag_Data
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 4, 23)
                        RFID_Pallet_No = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 1, 3)
                        'Panel_Pallet.Text = RFID_Pallet_No
                    End If
                    'For i = 1 To sRecvData.Length
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & Mid(sRecvData, i, 1) & " "
                    'Next
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & vbCrLf
                    sRecvData = ""
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub

file.content:
Sub SerialOpen()
        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try

            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)

        End Try

        Try

            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.Close()
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
                Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Tool1.Open()
                Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Else
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
                Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Tool1.Open()
            End If

            Tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            Tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)

        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Control_2_Arry()

    End Sub


    Private appMutex As Mutex
    Private FlagDuplicatedCheck As Boolean

    Private Function CheckDuplicated(strcolName As String, strVAl As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where " & strcolName & " = '" & strVAl & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Public Sub New()

        ' 이 호출은 디자이너에 필요합니다.
        InitializeComponent()


        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New Mutex(True, "Name", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            Environment.Exit(0)

Private Address_Connection_PLC1 As String
    Private Flag_Connection_PLC1 As Boolean
    Public PLC_VALUE(0 To 100) As Integer
    Private ACT_PLC1 As AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP

    Private IN_LABEL(10) As Label
    Private OUT_LABEL(10) As Label
    Private VALUE_IN_LABEL(10) As Label
    Private VALUE_OUT_LABEL(10) As Label

    Private RFID_PortNO As Long
    Private Recv_Count As Double
    Private Flag_Connection As Boolean
    Private Trd1 As Thread
    Private Trd2 As Thread
    Private Trd3 As Thread
    Private RecvString As New System.Text.StringBuilder()

    Private Tool1_Delay_count As Double
    Private Tool1_Ready As Boolean
    Private Tool_String1 As String
    Private Tool_Connection1 As Boolean
    Private Tool1_Count As Integer

    ' HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 8가지 조합 IO 조건
    Private Hgt_LH_QY(4) As String
    Private Hgt_LH_KY(4) As String
    Private Hgt_RH_QY(4) As String
    Private Hgt_RH_KY(4) As String
    Private NHgt_LH_QY(4) As String
    Private NHgt_LH_KY(4) As String
    Private NHgt_RH_QY(4) As String
    Private NHgt_RH_KY(4) As String
    Private CurrentToolP() As String ' 현재 제품에 선택된 IO 조건 (wStep=5에서 결정)
    Private toolstep As Integer      ' 툴 스텝 상태

    Private OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE As String
    Private Player As New SoundPlayer

    Private Sub DingDOng()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\DINGDONG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

    End Sub

    Private Sub NG()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

    End Sub

    Private Sub LabelNameing()

        IN_LABEL(0) = LABEL_ADDRESS_IN_0
        IN_LABEL(1) = LABEL_ADDRESS_IN_1
        IN_LABEL(2) = LABEL_ADDRESS_IN_2

        OUT_LABEL(0) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_0
        OUT_LABEL(1) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_1
        OUT_LABEL(2) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_2
        OUT_LABEL(3) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_3
        OUT_LABEL(4) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_4
        OUT_LABEL(5) = LABEL_ADDRESS_OUT_5

        VALUE_IN_LABEL(0) = VALUE_ADDRESS_IN_0
        VALUE_IN_LABEL(1) = VALUE_ADDRESS_IN_1
        VALUE_IN_LABEL(2) = VALUE_ADDRESS_IN_2

        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_0
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_1
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_2
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_3
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_4
        VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5) = VALUE_ADDRESS_OUT_5

        'IN_LABEL(0).Text = "W0000"
        'IN_LABEL(1).Text = "W0001"

        'OUT_LABEL(0).Text = "W0050"
        'OUT_LABEL(1).Text = "W0051"
        'OUT_LABEL(2).Text = "W0052"
        'OUT_LABEL(3).Text = "W0053"
        'OUT_LABEL(4).Text = "W0054"
        'OUT_LABEL(5).Text = "W0055"

        IN_LABEL(0).Text = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress, "0000")
        IN_LABEL(1).Text = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 1, "0000")
        IN_LABEL(2).Text = "W" & Format(PlcInStartAddress + 2, "0000")

        OUT_LABEL(0).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(1).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 1, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(2).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 2, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(3).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 3, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(4).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 4, "0000")
        OUT_LABEL(5).Text = "W" & Format(PlcOutStartAddress + 5, "0000")

    End Sub


    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button3_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
        FrmPort.Show()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        End
    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadPicture(ByVal picTarget As PictureBox, ByVal picName As String)

        Try
            picTarget.Image = System.Drawing.Image.FromFile(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Image\" & picName & ".png")
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try

        'LoadPicture(Picture_Main, "ASSEMBLE\NHGT")

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitControl()

        aStep = 0
        RealAirToolCount = 0

        REWORK_STOP = False
        Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = ""
        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = ""
        TargetBlower.Text = ""
        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = ""
        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = ""
        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
        Panel_Total_DEC.Text = ""
        Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.White

        Panel_PartName.Text = ""
        Panel_Before.Text = ""
        Panel_PartNo.Text = ""
        Panel_CarType.Text = ""
        Panel_Position.Text = ""
        Panel_HGT.Text = ""
        Panel_SN.Text = ""
        Panel_Vent.Text = ""
        Panel_Warmer.Text = ""
        Panel_Undertray.Text = ""
        Panel_Can.Text = ""
        Panel_Rework.Text = ""
        Panel_Now.Text = ""

        Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
        Panel_RF_DataCHeck.Text = ""
        Panel_RF_DataCHeck.BackColor = Color.White

        For i As Integer = 1 To 8
            SHAPE_W(i) = 0
            SHAPE_H(i) = 0
        Next

        Panel_TQ1.Text = ""

file.content:
ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "W0400" & vbLf &
                                "W0401" & vbLf &
                                "W0450" & vbLf &
                                "W0451" & vbLf &
                                "W0452" & vbLf &
                                "W0453" & vbLf &
                                "W0454" & vbLf &
                                "W0455" & vbLf &
                                "W0456" & vbLf &
                                "W0457"



        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(0)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(1)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(2)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PLC_VALUE(4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PLC_VALUE(5)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PLC_VALUE(6)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PLC_VALUE(7)

            For j = 0 To 1
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

Public Sub New()

        ' 이 호출은 디자이너에 필요합니다.
        InitializeComponent()


        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New Mutex(True, "Name", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        gConSTring = iniFile.ReadValue("SVR", "ConString", "")
        Dim tmp As String = iniFile.ReadValue("SET", "DuplicatedCheck", "")
        If tmp = "1" Then
            FlagDuplicatedCheck = True
        Else
            FlagDuplicatedCheck = False
        End If


        gConnection_Open()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        Dim i As Short
        Dim nCnt As Integer
        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim nameBuf As New VB6.FixedLengthString(64)
        Dim comName As String
        hReader = 0 'set reader handle to NULL
        hTag = 0 ' set tag handle to null
        RDR_LoadReaderDrivers(0) 'load rfidlib_ANM201.dll or other drivers

        nCnt = COMPort_Enum()
        For i = 0 To (nCnt - 1)
            iret = COMPort_GetEnumItem(i, nameBuf.Value, 64)
            If iret = 0 Then
                'UPGRADE_ISSUE: vbFromUnicode 상수가 업그레이드되지 않았습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="55B59875-9A95-4B71-9D6A-7C294BF7139D"'
                'comName = StrConv(nameBuf.Value, vbFromUnicode)
                Dim codepage As Integer = System.Globalization.CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.TextInfo.ANSICodePage
                Dim convertBytes() As Byte = Encoding.GetEncoding(codepage).GetBytes(nameBuf.Value)
                comName = System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(convertBytes)
            End If
        Next

        Init_Control()
        FLag_ONOFF = False
        Control_2_Arry()
        tStep1 = 0
        rStep = 0

        Address_Connection_PLC1 = "192.168.0.101"
        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False

        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_Basic_Data()

        SerialOpen()
        Label_Nameing()
        Recv_Count = 0

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect.Start()

        Tmr_Work.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work.Start()

        Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
        Trd2.IsBackground = True
        Trd2.Start()

        Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
        Trd3.IsBackground = True
        Trd3.Start()

        Tool_Ready = True

        IMAGE_PART = "88500-Q6300"
        If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
            FrmImage.Show()
            FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
        Else
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar

                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String1) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection1 = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0061" Then

                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            'abel_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                            lblToolValue.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                            If wStep = 6 Then

                                If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    Panel_TQ1.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.Text = "OK"
                                    Panel_TQ1_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()

  1375→    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String
  1376→
  1377→        Dim tmp As String = ""
  1378→        Dim i As Integer
  1379→
  1380→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
  1381→            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
  1382→        Next
  1383→
  1384→        Return tmp
  1385→
  1386→    End Function

  1388→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
  1389→
  1390→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
  1391→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
  1392→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
  1393→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
  1394→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
  1395→                i = i + 1
  1396→            Else
  1397→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
  1398→                i = i + 3
  1399→            End If
  1400→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
  1401→        Next
  1402→        Return retVal
  1403→
  1404→    End Function

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        ' D_Value LED 업데이트
        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Try
                If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
                Else
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & " Filled-50")
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Next i

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
            InitControl()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            InitControl()
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000000")
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
                TIMER_COUNT = 0
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                'Panel_RF_UID.Text = ""
                'frmimage.Close()
                wStep = 1 '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"
                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
                    wStep = 10
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then

            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    wStep = 10
                Else
                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
                    'Panel_Before.Text = "OK"
                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
                            'wStep = 10
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")s
                            'wStep = 10
                            REWORK_STOP = True
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))

                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 10
                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000000"

            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"

  1572→    ' IO 조건 확인 함수 ("번호_ON/번호_OFF" 형식)
  1573→    Private Function CheckIOCondition(str As String) As Boolean
  1574→        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(str) Then Return True
  1575→
  1576→        Dim conditions() As String = str.Split("/"c)
  1577→
  1578→        For Each cond As String In conditions
  1579→            cond = cond.Trim()
  1580→            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cond) Then Continue For
  1581→
  1582→            Dim parts() As String = cond.Split("_"c)
  1583→            If parts.Length <> 2 Then Return False
  1584→
  1585→            Dim ioNumber As Integer
  1586→            If Not Integer.TryParse(parts(0), ioNumber) Then Return False
  1587→
  1588→            Dim expectedValue As Integer
  1589→            If parts(1).ToUpper() = "ON" Then
  1590→                expectedValue = 1
  1591→            ElseIf parts(1).ToUpper() = "OFF" Then
  1592→                expectedValue = 0
  1593→            Else
  1594→                Return False
  1595→            End If
  1596→
  1597→            If ioNumber < 0 OrElse ioNumber >= D_Value.Length Then Return False
  1598→
  1599→            If D_Value(ioNumber) <> expectedValue Then
  1600→                Return False
  1601→            End If
  1602→        Next
  1603→
  1604→        Return True
  1605→    End Function

  1613→        Next
  1614→
  1615→        Return tmp
  1616→
  1617→    End Function

    ' IO 조건 확인 함수 ("번호_ON/번호_OFF" 형식)
    Private Function CheckIOCondition(str As String) As Boolean
        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(str) Then Return True

        Dim conditions() As String = str.Split("/"c)

        For Each cond As String In conditions
            cond = cond.Trim()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cond) Then Continue For

            Dim parts() As String = cond.Split("_"c)
            If parts.Length <> 2 Then Return False

            Dim ioNumber As Integer
            If Not Integer.TryParse(parts(0), ioNumber) Then Return False

            Dim expectedValue As Integer
            If parts(1).ToUpper() = "ON" Then
                expectedValue = 1
            ElseIf parts(1).ToUpper() = "OFF" Then
                expectedValue = 0
            Else
                Return False
            End If

            If ioNumber < 0 OrElse ioNumber >= D_Value.Length Then Return False

            If D_Value(ioNumber) <> expectedValue Then
                Return False
            End If
        Next

        Return True
    End Function
    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New Mutex(True, "Name", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        ExecuteQurryMDB("ALTER TABLE Table_basic ADD FlagDuplicateCheck BIT")

        ' ACT_PLC1 ActiveX 컨트롤 코드로 생성 (디자이너 오류 방지)
        ACT_PLC1 = New AxACTETHERLib.AxActQNUDECPUTCP()
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).BeginInit()
        ACT_PLC1.Enabled = True
        ACT_PLC1.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(1384, 5)
        ACT_PLC1.Name = "ACT_PLC1"
        ACT_PLC1.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(32, 32)
        Panel6.Controls.Add(ACT_PLC1)
        CType(ACT_PLC1, System.ComponentModel.ISupportInitialize).EndInit()

        gConnectionOpenSql()
        Dim i As Short
        LoadBasicData()
        InitControl()

        FLag_ONOFF = False
        Control_2_Arry()

        'INI 파일에서 툴 IO 조건 로드 (HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 8가지 조합)
        Dim iniSections() As String = {"TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "TOOL_HGT_LH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "TOOL_HGT_RH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY", "TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY"}

        If Not System.IO.File.Exists(iniFilePath) Then
            'INI 파일 신규 생성
            Dim sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(iniFilePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            sw.WriteLine("[SET]")
            sw.WriteLine("DuplicatedCheck=0")
            sw.WriteLine("")
            For Each sec As String In iniSections
                sw.WriteLine("[" & sec & "]")
                sw.WriteLine("P1=")
                sw.WriteLine("P2=")
                sw.WriteLine("P3=")
                sw.WriteLine("P4=")
                sw.WriteLine("P5=")
                sw.WriteLine("")
            Next
            sw.Close()
        Else
            '기존 파일에 없는 섹션만 추가
            Dim fileContent As String = System.IO.File.ReadAllText(iniFilePath, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            For Each sec As String In iniSections
                If Not fileContent.Contains("[" & sec & "]") Then
                    Dim sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(iniFilePath, True, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                    sw.WriteLine("")
                    sw.WriteLine("[" & sec & "]")
                    sw.WriteLine("P1=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P2=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P3=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P4=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P5=")
                    sw.Close()
                End If
            Next
        End If

        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        '8가지 조합 IO 조건 로드
        Hgt_LH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P2", "")

        Hgt_LH_KY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P3", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P4", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P5", "")

        Hgt_RH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P3", "")
