    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT_1()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ_1()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ_1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 10

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "W0400" & vbLf &
                                "W0401" & vbLf &
                                "W0450" & vbLf &
                                "W0451" & vbLf &
                                "W0452" & vbLf &
                                "W0453" & vbLf &
                                "W0454" & vbLf &
                                "W0455" & vbLf &
                                "W0456" & vbLf &
                                "W0457"



        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(0)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(1)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(2)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PLC_VALUE(4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PLC_VALUE(5)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PLC_VALUE(6)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PLC_VALUE(7)

            For j = 0 To 1
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT_1()

        ACT_PLC1.ActSourceNetworkNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActSourceStationNumber = 2
        ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 211

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = Address_Connection_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
        Else
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Create_Serial()

    Private Sub Load_Part(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            Panel_PartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            Panel_PartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Panel_CarType.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Option_CarType").Value)
            Panel_Position.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Option_LHRH").Value)

            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)
            If Rs.Fields("OPtion_HGT").Value = True Then
                Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT"
            Else
                Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT"
                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If
            If Rs.Fields("Option_VENT").Value = True Then
                Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT"
            Else
                Panel_Vent.Text = "-"
            End If
            If Trim(Rs.Fields("VENT_SERIAL").Value) = "0" Then
                TargetBlower.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
            Else
                OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE = Trim(Rs.Fields("VENT_SERIAL").Value)
                TargetBlower.Text = OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = ""
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = ""
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
            End If
            wStep = 4
            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_DB(snstr As String)

        strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN SET " &

                    "S50_TQ4 = '" & Panel_TQ4.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ5 = '" & Panel_TQ5.Text & "'," &

    Private Sub Save_DB_Rework(Serial As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & Serial & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            tmp = Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value
            tmp = CStr(CInt(tmp) + 1)
            Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value = tmp
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
            Init_Control()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            Init_Control()
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000")
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
                TIMER_COUNT = 0
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                'frmimage.Close()
                wStep = 1 '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000"
                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
                    wStep = 10
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then

            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    wStep = 10
                Else
                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
                            'wStep = 10
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                            'wStep = 10
                            REWORK_STOP = True
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))

                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 10
                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000"

            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_CarType.Text = "SP2i" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            Else
            End If
            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
            IMAGE_PART = Panel_PartNo.Text
            wStep = 4.1

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(6) = 1 Then
                wStep = 4.9
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.9 Then

            If REWORK_STOP = True Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9.1
            Else
                wStep = 5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("SEMI") Then
                Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                wStep = 6
            Else
                If Panel_CarType.Text.ToUpper.Contains("SP3I") = True Then
                    If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "PASS"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Black
                        TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                        wStep = 6
                    Else
                        wStep = 9
                    End If
                Else
                    If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                        If Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA" Then
                            TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                            wStep = 6
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 9
                    End If
                End If
            End If


        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then 'TOOL


        ElseIf wStep = 6.1 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.2

        ElseIf wStep = 6.3 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.4

        ElseIf wStep = 6.5 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.6

        ElseIf wStep = 6.7 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.8

        ElseIf wStep = 6.9 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            If (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA") Then
                Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text)
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9.1

            End If
        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(7) = 1 Then
                wStep = 10
            Else
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000")
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            Init_Control()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_BEFORE(strSN As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & strSN & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                Panel_Before.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S40_DECISION").Value)
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_Before.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try

            Try
                If Trim(Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value) = "0" Then
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK"
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then

                Try
                    Panel_Now.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S50_DECISION").Value)
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Catch ex As Exception
                    Panel_Now.Text = "NG"
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Red
                End Try

            End If

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Sub DO_ON(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        Mid$(D_OutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "1"
        LED_OUT(num1).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(num1) & " Filled-50")

    End Sub

    Sub DO_OFF(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        Mid$(D_OutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "0"
        LED_OUT(num1).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(num1) & "-50")

    End Sub

    Sub DO_WRITE()
        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)
    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim scandata As String
        Dim Incoming As String
        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        scandata = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text

        '        첫자리 LH, RH
        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력


        'S50_PUMP_SERIAL/BLOWER_BARCODE

        If wStep = 5 Then

            Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text

            If FlagDuplicatedCheck = True Then

                If CheckDuplicated("S50_PUMP_SERIAL", scandata) = True Then
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "L" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "R" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                    If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "L" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If
                ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                    If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "R" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        End If

        If wStep = 9 Then
            If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then

                If FlagDuplicatedCheck = True Then

                    If CheckDuplicated("BLOWER_BARCODE", scandata) = True Then
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    End If
                Else
                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                    Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                    Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If
            Else
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

End Class

﻿Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Net
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Media
Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms
Imports System.IO.Ports

Public Class FrmMain

    Declare Function Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection Lib "kernel32" (ByRef oldvalue As Long) As Boolean
    Declare Function Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection Lib "kernel32" (ByRef oldvalue As Long) As Boolean
    Private osk As String = "C:\Windows\System32\osk.exe"

    Private RFID_Pallet_No As String
    Private FLAG_RFID_RUN As Boolean
    Private RF_READ_DELAY As Double
    Private RF_READ_COUNT As Double

    Public REWORK_STOP As Boolean
    Public IMAGE_PART As String
    Private TIMER_COUNT As Double
    Private FLag_ONOFF As Boolean
    Private TOol_Delay_Count As Double
    Private Tool_Ready As Boolean
    Private Paint_Count As Integer

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            'RFID Data length => 1A(26자리) 읽어오기 *앞 3자리 파레트 넘버 나머지 23자리 시리얼 넘버
            Serial_RFID.Write(Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H05") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1A") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(ByVal str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Dim RFID_Tag_Data As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    Else
                        RFID_Tag_Data = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 26)
                        lblTagData.Text = RFID_Tag_Data
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 4, 23)
                        RFID_Pallet_No = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 1, 3)
                        'Panel_Pallet.Text = RFID_Pallet_No
                    End If
                    'For i = 1 To sRecvData.Length
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & Mid(sRecvData, i, 1) & " "
                    'Next
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & vbCrLf
                    sRecvData = ""
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()
        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open RFID Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try

            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            Else
                Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
                Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Scanner.Open()
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)

        End Try

        Try

            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.Close()
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
                Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Tool1.Open()
                Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Else
                Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
                Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
                Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Tool1.Open()
            End If

            Tmr_Tool.Interval = 5000
            Tmr_Tool.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)

        End Try

        ' Serial_Module for IO module
        Try
            If PortNumber_Module <> "" AndAlso PortNumber_Module <> "NONE" Then
                If Serial_Module.IsOpen() = True Then
                    Serial_Module.Close()
                End If
                Serial_Module.PortName = PortNumber_Module
                Serial_Module.BaudRate = 115200
                Serial_Module.DataBits = 8
                Serial_Module.Open()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Fail Module " & PortNumber_Module)
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub Control_2_Arry()

        ' Create LED panel programmatically
        Dim panelLED As New Panel()
        panelLED.BackColor = Color.Gainsboro
        panelLED.BorderStyle = BorderStyle.FixedSingle
        panelLED.Location = New Point(1037, 800)
        panelLED.Size = New Size(222, 135)
        Me.Controls.Add(panelLED)
        panelLED.BringToFront()

        ' Create P_IN0~15 PictureBoxes (row0: IN0-7, row1: IN8-15)
        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Dim pb As New PictureBox()
            Dim col As Integer = i Mod 8
            Dim row As Integer = i \ 8
            pb.Location = New Point(3 + col * 27, 3 + row * 42)
            pb.Size = New Size(27, 42)
            pb.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
            pb.TabStop = False
            pb.Name = "P_IN" & i.ToString()
            Try
                pb.Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
            Catch : End Try
            panelLED.Controls.Add(pb)
            LED_IN(i) = pb
        Next

        ' Create P_OUT0~7 PictureBoxes (row2)
        For i As Integer = 0 To 7
            Dim pb As New PictureBox()
            pb.Location = New Point(3 + i * 27, 87)
            pb.Size = New Size(27, 42)
            pb.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.StretchImage
            pb.TabStop = False
            pb.Name = "P_OUT" & i.ToString()
            Try
                pb.Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
            Catch : End Try
            panelLED.Controls.Add(pb)
            LED_OUT(i) = pb
        Next

        ' Create pos1~5 labels in Panel5 for IO condition display
        Dim posLabels() As Label = Nothing
        ReDim posLabels(4)
        For i As Integer = 0 To 4
            Dim lbl As New Label()
            lbl.BackColor = Color.FromArgb(255, 255, 192)
            lbl.BorderStyle = BorderStyle.FixedSingle
            lbl.Font = New Font("Microsoft Sans Serif", 14.0!, FontStyle.Bold)
            lbl.ForeColor = Color.Black
            lbl.Location = New Point(108, 540 + i * 50)
            lbl.Size = New Size(331, 43)
            lbl.TextAlign = ContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
            lbl.Name = "pos" & (i + 1).ToString()
            Panel5.Controls.Add(lbl)
            posLabels(i) = lbl
        Next
        pos1 = posLabels(0)
        pos2 = posLabels(1)
        pos3 = posLabels(2)
        pos4 = posLabels(3)
        pos5 = posLabels(4)

        ' Create TOOL button for FrmToolPos
        Dim btnTool As New Button()
        btnTool.Location = New Point(424, 40)
        btnTool.Size = New Size(75, 34)
        btnTool.Text = "TOOL"
        btnTool.UseVisualStyleBackColor = True
        AddHandler btnTool.Click, AddressOf Button5_Click
        Panel13.Controls.Add(btnTool)

    End Sub


    Private appMutex As Mutex
    Private FlagDuplicatedCheck As Boolean

    Private Function CheckDuplicated(strcolName As String, strVAl As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where " & strcolName & " = '" & strVAl & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Public Sub New()

        ' 이 호출은 디자이너에 필요합니다.
        InitializeComponent()


        Dim createdNew As Boolean = False
        appMutex = New Mutex(True, "Name", createdNew)
        If Not createdNew Then
            Environment.Exit(0)
        End If

        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)
        gConSTring = iniFile.ReadValue("SVR", "ConString", "")
        Dim tmp As String = iniFile.ReadValue("SET", "DuplicatedCheck", "")
        If tmp = "1" Then
            FlagDuplicatedCheck = True
        Else
            FlagDuplicatedCheck = False
        End If


        gConnection_Open()
        ' InitializeComponent() 호출 뒤에 초기화 코드를 추가하십시오.

        Dim i As Short
        Dim nCnt As Integer
        Dim iret As Integer
        Dim nameBuf As New VB6.FixedLengthString(64)
        Dim comName As String
        hReader = 0 'set reader handle to NULL
        hTag = 0 ' set tag handle to null
        RDR_LoadReaderDrivers(0) 'load rfidlib_ANM201.dll or other drivers

        nCnt = COMPort_Enum()
        For i = 0 To (nCnt - 1)
            iret = COMPort_GetEnumItem(i, nameBuf.Value, 64)
            If iret = 0 Then
                'UPGRADE_ISSUE: vbFromUnicode 상수가 업그레이드되지 않았습니다. 자세한 내용은 다음을 참조하십시오. 'ms-help://MS.VSCC.v90/dv_commoner/local/redirect.htm?keyword="55B59875-9A95-4B71-9D6A-7C294BF7139D"'
                'comName = StrConv(nameBuf.Value, vbFromUnicode)
                Dim codepage As Integer = System.Globalization.CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.TextInfo.ANSICodePage
                Dim convertBytes() As Byte = Encoding.GetEncoding(codepage).GetBytes(nameBuf.Value)
                comName = System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetString(convertBytes)
            End If
        Next

        Init_Control()
        FLag_ONOFF = False
        Control_2_Arry()
        tStep1 = 0
        rStep = 0

        Address_Connection_PLC1 = "192.168.0.101"
        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False

        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_Basic_Data()

        SerialOpen()
        Label_Nameing()
        Recv_Count = 0

        Tmr_Connect.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect.Start()

        Tmr_Work.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work.Start()

        Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
        Trd2.IsBackground = True
        Trd2.Start()

        Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
        Trd3.IsBackground = True
        Trd3.Start()

        ' Module IO thread
        If Serial_Module.IsOpen = True Then
            D_OutString = "S00000000E"
            Trd4 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask4_Module)
            Trd4.IsBackground = True
            Trd4.Start()
            Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)
        End If

        ' Load IO conditions from INI
        LoadIOConditionsFromINI()

        Tool_Ready = True
        toolstep = 0

        IMAGE_PART = "88500-Q6300"
        If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
            FrmImage.Show()
            FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
        Else
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar

                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String1) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection1 = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String1) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String1, 6, 4) = "0061" Then

                            Serial_Tool1.WriteLine(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            'abel_Message.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                            lblToolValue.Text = Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String1, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String1, 146, 2)))
                            If wStep = 6 Then

                                If Mid(Tool_String1, 109, 1) = "1" Then

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect_Tick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT_1()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ_1()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If
        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.5
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            Read_RFiD()
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ_1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 10

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "W0400" & vbLf &
                                "W0401" & vbLf &
                                "W0450" & vbLf &
                                "W0451" & vbLf &
                                "W0452" & vbLf &
                                "W0453" & vbLf &
                                "W0454" & vbLf &
                                "W0455" & vbLf &
                                "W0456" & vbLf &
                                "W0457"



        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            VALUE_IN_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(0)
            VALUE_IN_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(1)

            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(0).Text = PLC_VALUE(2)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(1).Text = PLC_VALUE(3)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(2).Text = PLC_VALUE(4)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(3).Text = PLC_VALUE(5)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(4).Text = PLC_VALUE(6)
            VALUE_OUT_LABEL(5).Text = PLC_VALUE(7)

            For j = 0 To 1
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 5
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE_1(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT_1()

        ACT_PLC1.ActSourceNetworkNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActSourceStationNumber = 2
        ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 211

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = Address_Connection_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = False
        Else
            Flag_Connection_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Create_Serial()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE S10_START_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

        Else

        Rs.Close()

    Private Sub Load_Part(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            Panel_PartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            Panel_PartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Panel_CarType.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Option_CarType").Value)
            Panel_Position.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Option_LHRH").Value)

            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)
            If Rs.Fields("OPtion_HGT").Value = True Then
                Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT"
            Else
                Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT"
                Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If
            If Rs.Fields("Option_VENT").Value = True Then
                Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT"
            Else
                Panel_Vent.Text = "-"
            End If
            If Trim(Rs.Fields("VENT_SERIAL").Value) = "0" Then
                TargetBlower.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
            Else
                OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE = Trim(Rs.Fields("VENT_SERIAL").Value)
                TargetBlower.Text = OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = ""
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = ""
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.White
            End If
            wStep = 4
            LoadPicture(Picture_Main, Panel_PartNo.Text)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_DB(snstr As String)

        Dim strSQL As String

        Connection_Open()

        strSQL = "UPDATE TABLE_MAIN SET " &
                    "S50_START_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'," &
                    "S50_START_TIME = '" & StartTime & "'," &
                    "S50_END_TIME = '" & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "'," &
                    "S50_PUMP_SERIAL = '" & Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ1 = '" & Panel_TQ1.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ2 = '" & Panel_TQ2.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ3 = '" & Panel_TQ3.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ4 = '" & Panel_TQ4.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_TQ5 = '" & Panel_TQ5.Text & "'," &
                    "BLOWER_BARCODE = '" & Panel_Blower_Value.Text & "'," &
                    "S50_DECISION = '" & "OK" & "' " &
                    "WHERE SERIAL_NUMBER = '" & snstr & "'"

        Sql_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_DB_Rework(Serial As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & Serial & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            tmp = Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value
            tmp = CStr(CInt(tmp) + 1)
            Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value = tmp
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        ' D_Value LED update
        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Try
                If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
                Else
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & " Filled-50")
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Next i

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
            Init_Control()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            Init_Control()
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000")
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
                TIMER_COUNT = 0
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                'frmimage.Close()
                wStep = 1 '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000"
                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
                    wStep = 10
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then

            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    wStep = 10
                Else
                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
                            'wStep = 10
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                            'wStep = 10
                            REWORK_STOP = True
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))

                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 10
                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000"

            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_CarType.Text = "SP2i" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            Else
            End If
            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
            IMAGE_PART = Panel_PartNo.Text
            wStep = 4.1

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(6) = 1 Then
                wStep = 4.9
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.9 Then

            If REWORK_STOP = True Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9.1
            Else
                wStep = 5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("SEMI") Then
                Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                wStep = 6
            Else
                If Panel_CarType.Text.ToUpper.Contains("SP3I") = True Then
                    If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "PASS"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Black
                        TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                        wStep = 6
                    Else
                        wStep = 9
                    End If
                Else
                    If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                        If Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA" Then
                            TOol_Delay_Count = 0
                            wStep = 6
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 9
                    End If
                End If
            End If


        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then 'TOOL


        ElseIf wStep = 6.1 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.2

        ElseIf wStep = 6.3 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.4

        ElseIf wStep = 6.5 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.6

        ElseIf wStep = 6.7 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.8

        ElseIf wStep = 6.9 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            If (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA") Then
                Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text)
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9.1

            End If
        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(7) = 1 Then
                wStep = 10
            Else
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000")
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            Init_Control()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_BEFORE(strSN As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & strSN & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                Panel_Before.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S40_DECISION").Value)
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_Before.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try

            Try
                If Trim(Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value) = "0" Then
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK"
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then

                Try
                    Panel_Now.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S50_DECISION").Value)
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Catch ex As Exception
                    Panel_Now.Text = "NG"
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Red
                End Try

            End If

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim scandata As String
        Dim Incoming As String
        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        scandata = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text

        '        첫자리 LH, RH
        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력


        'S50_PUMP_SERIAL/BLOWER_BARCODE

        If wStep = 5 Then

            Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text

            If FlagDuplicatedCheck = True Then

                If CheckDuplicated("S50_PUMP_SERIAL", scandata) = True Then
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "L" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "R" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                    If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "L" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If
                ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                    If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "R" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        End If

        If wStep = 9 Then
            If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then

                If FlagDuplicatedCheck = True Then

                    If CheckDuplicated("BLOWER_BARCODE", scandata) = True Then
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    End If
                Else
                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                    Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                    Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If
            Else
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

End Class

Private Sub P_IN0_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs)

    End Sub

    Private Sub NG()
        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()
    End Sub

    ' IO condition check function ("number_ON/number_OFF" format)
    Private Function CheckIOCondition(str As String) As Boolean
        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(str) Then Return True

        Dim conditions() As String = str.Split("/"c)

        For Each cond As String In conditions
            cond = cond.Trim()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cond) Then Continue For

            Dim parts() As String = cond.Split("_"c)
            If parts.Length <> 2 Then Return False

            Dim ioNumber As Integer
            If Not Integer.TryParse(parts(0), ioNumber) Then Return False

            Dim expectedValue As Integer
            If parts(1).ToUpper() = "ON" Then
                expectedValue = 1
            ElseIf parts(1).ToUpper() = "OFF" Then
                expectedValue = 0
            Else
                Return False
            End If

            If ioNumber < 0 OrElse ioNumber >= D_Value.Length Then Return False

            If D_Value(ioNumber) <> expectedValue Then
                Return False
            End If
        Next

        Return True
    End Function

    ' Module IO serial read thread
    Private Sub ThreadTask4_Module()
        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming IsNot Nothing Then
                    RecvString.Append(Incoming)

                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 2, 1))
                            D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 3, 1))
                            D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 4, 1))
                            D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 5, 1))
                            D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 6, 1))
                            D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 7, 1))
                            D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 8, 1))
                            D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 9, 1))
                            D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 10, 1))
                            D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 11, 1))
                            D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 12, 1))
                            D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 13, 1))
                            D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 14, 1))
                            D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 15, 1))
                            D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 16, 1))
                            D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 17, 1))
                        End If
                    End If

                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Loop
    End Sub

    ' Load IO conditions from INI file (HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 8 combinations)
    Private Sub LoadIOConditionsFromINI()

        Dim iniSections() As String = {"TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "TOOL_HGT_LH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "TOOL_HGT_RH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY", "TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY"}

        If Not System.IO.File.Exists(iniFilePath) Then
            ' Create new INI file
            Dim sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(iniFilePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            sw.WriteLine("[SET]")
            sw.WriteLine("DuplicatedCheck=0")
            sw.WriteLine("")
            For Each sec As String In iniSections
                sw.WriteLine("[" & sec & "]")
                sw.WriteLine("P1=")
                sw.WriteLine("P2=")
                sw.WriteLine("P3=")
                sw.WriteLine("P4=")
                sw.WriteLine("P5=")
                sw.WriteLine("")
            Next
            sw.Close()
        Else
            ' Add missing sections to existing file
            Dim fileContent As String = System.IO.File.ReadAllText(iniFilePath, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            For Each sec As String In iniSections
                If Not fileContent.Contains("[" & sec & "]") Then
                    Dim sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(iniFilePath, True, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                    sw.WriteLine("")
                    sw.WriteLine("[" & sec & "]")
                    sw.WriteLine("P1=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P2=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P3=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P4=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P5=")
                    sw.Close()
                End If
            Next
        End If

        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)

        Hgt_LH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P2", "")

Public Class FrmMain

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            'RFID Data length => 1A(26자리) 읽어오기 *앞 3자리 파레트 넘버 나머지 23자리 시리얼 넘버
            Serial_RFID.Write(Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H05") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1A") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03"))
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(ByVal str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask3()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""
        Dim RFID_Tag_Data As String = ""

        Do
            Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
            If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
            Else
                sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                    If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                    Else
                        RFID_Tag_Data = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 26)
                        lblTagData.Text = RFID_Tag_Data
                        Panel_RF_READ.Text = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 4, 23)
                        RFID_Pallet_No = Mid(RFID_Tag_Data, 1, 3)
                        'Panel_Pallet.Text = RFID_Pallet_No
                    End If
                    'For i = 1 To sRecvData.Length
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & Mid(sRecvData, i, 1) & " "
                    'Next
                    'TextBox1.Text = TextBox1.Text & vbCrLf
                    sRecvData = ""
                End If
            End If
        Loop

    End Sub
