    Private Sub Tmr_Work_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work.Tick

        Label_STep.Text = wStep

        ' D_Value LED update
        For i As Integer = 0 To 15
            Try
                If D_Value(i) = 0 Then
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & "-50")
                Else
                    LED_IN(i).Image = My.Resources.ResourceManager.GetObject(CStr(i) & " Filled-50")
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Next i

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            WorkPArt = Panel_PartNo.Text
            Init_Control()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            Init_Control()
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000")
            wStep = 0
        End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 Then
                If FrmImage.Visible = True Then FrmImage.Close()
                TIMER_COUNT = 0
                Panel_RF_READ.Text = ""
                'frmimage.Close()
                wStep = 1 '제품인
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1 Then

            TIMER_COUNT = TIMER_COUNT + 0.1
            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then wStep = 1.5
            If TIMER_COUNT > 2.0 Then
                If Panel_RF_READ.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_STRING_1 = "000000"
                    Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "3"
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
                    wStep = 10
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 1.5 Then

            If Panel_RF_READ.Text <> "" Then
                Panel_SN.Text = Panel_RF_READ.Text
                If Panel_SN.Text = "00000000000000000000000" Then
                    PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    wStep = 10
                Else
                    Check_BEFORE(Panel_SN.Text)
                    If Panel_Before.Text = "OK" Then
                        If Panel_Rework.Text = "" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "OK" Then
                            'wStep = 10
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                            'PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                            'wStep = 10
                            REWORK_STOP = True
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))

                        ElseIf Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" And Panel_Now.Text = "NG" Then
                            Load_Part(Mid(Panel_SN.Text, 13, 11))
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 10
                        PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0454", "3")
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING_1 = "000000"

            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 1, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 2, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_Vent.Text = "VENT" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 3, 1) = "2"
            End If

            If Panel_CarType.Text = "SP2i" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 4, 1) = "1"
            Else
            End If
            Mid(PLC_STRING_1, 5, 1) = "1"
            PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", PLC_STRING_1)
            IMAGE_PART = Panel_PartNo.Text
            wStep = 4.1

        ElseIf wStep = 4.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(6) = 1 Then
                wStep = 4.9
            Else
                wStep = 4
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 4.9 Then

            If REWORK_STOP = True Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9.1
            Else
                wStep = 5
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            If Panel_CarType.Text.Contains("SEMI") Then
                Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA"
                Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Green
                TOol_Delay_Count = 0

                ' Determine IO condition based on HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × KY/QY
                toolstep = 1000
                Dim isKY As Boolean = Panel_CarType.Text.ToUpper.Contains("KY")
                If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_QY
                    Else
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_QY
                    End If
                    toolstep = 100
                ElseIf Panel_HGT.Text = "N/HGT" Then
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = NHgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = NHgt_LH_QY
                    Else
                        If isKY Then CurrentToolP = NHgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = NHgt_RH_QY
                    End If
                    toolstep = 10
                End If
                If CurrentToolP IsNot Nothing AndAlso toolstep <> 1000 Then
                    pos1.Text = CurrentToolP(0)
                    pos2.Text = CurrentToolP(1)
                    pos3.Text = CurrentToolP(2)
                    pos4.Text = CurrentToolP(3)
                    pos5.Text = CurrentToolP(4)
                End If

                wStep = 6
            Else
                If Panel_CarType.Text.ToUpper.Contains("SP3I") = True Then
                    If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "PASS"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Black
                        TOol_Delay_Count = 0

                        ' Determine IO condition
                        Dim isKY2 As Boolean = Panel_CarType.Text.ToUpper.Contains("KY")
                        If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                            If isKY2 Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_QY
                        Else
                            If isKY2 Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_QY
                        End If
                        toolstep = 100
                        If CurrentToolP IsNot Nothing Then
                            pos1.Text = CurrentToolP(0)
                            pos2.Text = CurrentToolP(1)
                            pos3.Text = CurrentToolP(2)
                            pos4.Text = CurrentToolP(3)
                            pos5.Text = CurrentToolP(4)
                        End If

                        wStep = 6
                    Else
                        wStep = 9
                    End If
                Else
                    If Panel_HGT.Text = "HGT" Then
                        If Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NA" Then
                            TOol_Delay_Count = 0

                            ' Determine IO condition
                            Dim isKY3 As Boolean = Panel_CarType.Text.ToUpper.Contains("KY")
                            If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                                If isKY3 Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_LH_QY
                            Else
                                If isKY3 Then CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_KY Else CurrentToolP = Hgt_RH_QY
                            End If
                            toolstep = 100
                            If CurrentToolP IsNot Nothing Then
                                pos1.Text = CurrentToolP(0)
                                pos2.Text = CurrentToolP(1)
                                pos3.Text = CurrentToolP(2)
                                pos4.Text = CurrentToolP(3)
                                pos5.Text = CurrentToolP(4)
                            End If

                            wStep = 6
                        End If
                    Else
                        wStep = 9
                    End If
                End If
            End If


        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then 'TOOL - toolstep based IO condition check
            ' toolstep=1000 means all TQ complete
            If toolstep = 1000 Then
                wStep = 6.9
            End If

            ' N/HGT toolstep 10~14 (using CurrentToolP)
            If toolstep = 10 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(0)) Then
                    toolstep = 11
                End If
            ElseIf toolstep = 11 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(1)) Then
                    toolstep = 12
                End If
            ElseIf toolstep = 12 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(2)) Then
                    toolstep = 13
                End If
            ElseIf toolstep = 13 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(3)) Then
                    toolstep = 14
                End If
            ElseIf toolstep = 14 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(4)) Then
                    toolstep = 1000
                End If

            ' HGT toolstep 100~104 (using CurrentToolP)
            ElseIf toolstep = 100 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(0)) Then
                    toolstep = 101
                End If
            ElseIf toolstep = 101 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(1)) Then
                    toolstep = 102
                End If
            ElseIf toolstep = 102 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(2)) Then
                    toolstep = 103
                End If
            ElseIf toolstep = 103 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(3)) Then
                    toolstep = 104
                End If
            ElseIf toolstep = 104 Then
                If CheckIOCondition(CurrentToolP(4)) Then
                    toolstep = 1000
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 6.1 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.2

        ElseIf wStep = 6.3 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.4

        ElseIf wStep = 6.5 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.6

        ElseIf wStep = 6.7 Then

            TOol_Delay_Count = TOol_Delay_Count + 0.1
            If TOol_Delay_Count > 1 Then wStep = 6.8

        ElseIf wStep = 6.9 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then 'SEND PLC COMPLETE

            If (Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK" Or Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NA") Then
                Panel_Total_DEC.Text = "OK"
                Panel_Total_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Save_DB(Panel_SN.Text)
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0455", "1")
                wStep = 9.1

            End If
        ElseIf wStep = 9.1 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(7) = 1 Then
                wStep = 10
            Else
                wStep = 9
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE_1("W", "0450", "000000")
                wStep = 11
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            Init_Control()
            If IMAGE_PART <> "" Then
                FrmImage.Show()
                FrmImage.Load_WorkImage(IMAGE_PART)
            Else
            End If
            wStep = 0

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_BEFORE(strSN As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main where SERIAL_NUMBER ='" & strSN & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Try
                Panel_Before.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S40_DECISION").Value)
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Blue
            Catch ex As Exception
                Panel_Before.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Before.BackColor = Color.Red
            End Try

            Try
                If Trim(Rs.Fields("REWORK").Value) = "0" Then
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK"
                    Panel_Rework.BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception

            End Try

            If Panel_Rework.Text = "REWORK" Then

                Try
                    Panel_Now.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("S50_DECISION").Value)
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Blue
                Catch ex As Exception
                    Panel_Now.Text = "NG"
                    Panel_Now.BackColor = Color.Red
                End Try

            End If

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, i, retVal
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    ' IO condition check function ("number_ON/number_OFF" format)
    Private Function CheckIOCondition(str As String) As Boolean
        If String.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(str) Then Return True

        Dim conditions() As String = str.Split("/"c)

        For Each cond As String In conditions
            cond = cond.Trim()
            If String.IsNullOrEmpty(cond) Then Continue For

            Dim parts() As String = cond.Split("_"c)
            If parts.Length <> 2 Then Return False

            Dim ioNumber As Integer
            If Not Integer.TryParse(parts(0), ioNumber) Then Return False

            Dim expectedValue As Integer
            If parts(1).ToUpper() = "ON" Then
                expectedValue = 1
            ElseIf parts(1).ToUpper() = "OFF" Then
                expectedValue = 0
            Else
                Return False
            End If

            If ioNumber < 0 OrElse ioNumber >= D_Value.Length Then Return False

            If D_Value(ioNumber) <> expectedValue Then
                Return False
            End If
        Next

        Return True
    End Function

    ' Module IO serial read thread
    Private Sub ThreadTask4_Module()
        Do While Serial_Module.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = Serial_Module.ReadLine()

                If Incoming IsNot Nothing Then
                    RecvString.Append(Incoming)

                    If RecvString.Length = 34 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 34, 1) = "E" Then
                            D_Value(0) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 2, 1))
                            D_Value(1) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 3, 1))
                            D_Value(2) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 4, 1))
                            D_Value(3) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 5, 1))
                            D_Value(4) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 6, 1))
                            D_Value(5) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 7, 1))
                            D_Value(6) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 8, 1))
                            D_Value(7) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 9, 1))
                            D_Value(8) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 10, 1))
                            D_Value(9) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 11, 1))
                            D_Value(10) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 12, 1))
                            D_Value(11) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 13, 1))
                            D_Value(12) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 14, 1))
                            D_Value(13) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 15, 1))
                            D_Value(14) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 16, 1))
                            D_Value(15) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, 17, 1))
                        End If
                    End If

                    RecvString.Clear()
                    Serial_Module.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Loop
    End Sub

    ' Load IO conditions from INI file (HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 8 combinations)
    Private Sub LoadIOConditionsFromINI()

        Dim iniSections() As String = {"TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "TOOL_HGT_LH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "TOOL_HGT_RH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_NHGT_LH_QY", "TOOL_NHGT_LH_KY",
                                       "TOOL_NHGT_RH_QY", "TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY"}

        If Not System.IO.File.Exists(iniFilePath) Then
            ' Create new INI file
            Dim sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(iniFilePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            sw.WriteLine("[SET]")
            sw.WriteLine("DuplicatedCheck=0")
            sw.WriteLine("")
            For Each sec As String In iniSections
                sw.WriteLine("[" & sec & "]")
                sw.WriteLine("P1=")
                sw.WriteLine("P2=")
                sw.WriteLine("P3=")
                sw.WriteLine("P4=")
                sw.WriteLine("P5=")
                sw.WriteLine("")
            Next
            sw.Close()
        Else
            ' Add missing sections to existing file
            Dim fileContent As String = System.IO.File.ReadAllText(iniFilePath, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
            For Each sec As String In iniSections
                If Not fileContent.Contains("[" & sec & "]") Then
                    Dim sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(iniFilePath, True, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                    sw.WriteLine("")
                    sw.WriteLine("[" & sec & "]")
                    sw.WriteLine("P1=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P2=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P3=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P4=")
                    sw.WriteLine("P5=")
                    sw.Close()
                End If
            Next
        End If

        Dim iniFile As New IniFile(iniFilePath)

        Hgt_LH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P3", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P4", "")
        Hgt_LH_QY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_QY", "P5", "")

        Hgt_LH_KY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P3", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P4", "")
        Hgt_LH_KY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_LH_KY", "P5", "")

        Hgt_RH_QY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P3", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(3) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P4", "")
        Hgt_RH_QY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_QY", "P5", "")

        Hgt_RH_KY(0) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_KY", "P1", "")
        Hgt_RH_KY(1) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_KY", "P2", "")
        Hgt_RH_KY(2) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_HGT_RH_KY", "P3", "")

        NHgt_RH_KY(4) = iniFile.ReadValue("TOOL_NHGT_RH_KY", "P5", "")

        D_OutString = "S00000000E"

    End Sub

    ' Open FrmToolPos
    Private Sub Button5_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs)
        Dim frm As New FrmToolPos()
        frm.ShowDialog(Me)
    End Sub

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim scandata As String
        Dim Incoming As String
        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        Panel_Scanner_Input.Text = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        scandata = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text

        '        첫자리 LH, RH
        '2~3자리 : 생산년도
        '4자리 : 생산월(A - 1월, B - 2월 .....)
        '5~6자리 : 생산일자
        '7~11자리 : 로트숫자
        '이후자리:   펌핑 작동력


        'S50_PUMP_SERIAL/BLOWER_BARCODE

        If wStep = 5 Then

            Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text

            If FlagDuplicatedCheck = True Then

                If CheckDuplicated("S50_PUMP_SERIAL", scandata) = True Then
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                    Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "L" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                        If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "R" Then
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                            DingDOng()
                        Else
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                            Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                            NG()
                        End If
                    End If
                End If
            Else
                If Panel_Position.Text = "LH" Then
                    If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "L" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If
                ElseIf Panel_Position.Text = "RH" Then
                    If Mid(Panel_Pump_VAlue.Text, 1, 1) = "R" Then
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.Text = "NG"
                        Panel_Pump_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        NG()
                    End If
                End If
            End If

        End If

        If wStep = 9 Then
            If Panel_Scanner_Input.Text.Contains(OPTION_BLOWER_BARCODE) And Panel_Blower_DEC.Text <> "NA" Then

                If FlagDuplicatedCheck = True Then

                    If CheckDuplicated("BLOWER_BARCODE", scandata) = True Then
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "DUPLICATED"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                        DingDOng()
                    Else
                        Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                        Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                        DingDOng()
                    End If
                Else
                    Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                    Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "OK"
                    Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If
            Else
                Panel_Blower_Value.Text = Panel_Scanner_Input.Text
                Panel_Blower_DEC.Text = "NG"
                Panel_Blower_DEC.BackColor = Color.Red
                NG()
            End If
        End If

    End Sub

End Class

---
name: ST40 SP3 MECA IO/ToolPos feature addition
description: ST40 project (SP3 MECA LH RH) - added Serial Module IO, LED display, FrmToolPos, INI IO conditions from S50 (KY FRT CUSH)
type: project
---

## ST40 SP3 MECA Feature Addition (2026-03-16)

**Path:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\`
**Project:** ST50.vbproj (RootNamespace: S50, AssemblyName: SP3_LINE1_OP50)
**Framework:** .NET Framework 4.8, VB.NET WinForms

### Work Done (2026-03-16 11:34)
Ported features from S50 (KY FRT CUSH) project to ST40:

1. **Serial_Module IO** — 115200bps, ThreadTask4_Module for D_Value read (S...E protocol)
2. **LED display** — P_IN0~15 + P_OUT0~7 PictureBoxes created programmatically in Control_2_Arry()
3. **FrmToolPos** — Image + coordinate editor, 8 spec combinations (HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × KY/QY), INI save/load
4. **INI IO conditions** — LoadIOConditionsFromINI(), CheckIOCondition(), toolstep logic in wStep=5/6
5. **pos1~5 labels** — IO condition display in Panel5 (dynamic creation)
6. **FrmPort Module port** — ComboBox5 for Module serial port
7. **DB auto-migration** — ALTER TABLE Table_SerialPort ADD Module (on startup)
8. **LED resources** — 32 PNG files copied, Resources.resx + Designer.vb updated

**Why:** DSC India factory line standardization — same IO module/tool position features across stations
**How to apply:** Same pattern can be applied to other stations (S10, S20, S30, etc.) in KY FRT CUSH or SP3 MECA solutions

message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - User wanted to port features from the S50 project (KY FRT CUSH) to the ST40 project (SP3 MECA LH RH) - specifically: SerialPort IO module communication, LED IO display on main form, FrmToolPos image+coordinate editor form, and INI-based IO condition editing
   - User confirmed that pos1~pos5 coordinate display labels and the TOOL button for FrmToolPos should also be included
   - User requested automatic DB column migration (ALTER TABLE) for Module column in Table_SerialPort on startup
   - User requested saving work log to memory
   - User's final request: commit and push both DSC_INDIA_1 and DSC_INDIA_2 repositories

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - VB.NET WinForms (.NET Framework 4.8) with Mitsubishi PLC (QnUDE) TCP communication
   - Serial IO Module protocol: `S00000000E` format, 115200bps, 16 digital inputs (D_Value 0-15) + 8 digital outputs
   - INI file read/write using kernel32 DLL imports (GetPrivateProfileString/WritePrivateProfileString)
   - IO condition format: `"번호_ON/번호_OFF"` (e.g., "1_ON/2_OFF") parsed by CheckIOCondition()
   - 8 spec combinations: HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × KY/QY for tool position and IO conditions
   - toolstep state machine: 10~14 for N/HGT, 100~104 for HGT, 1000 = complete
   - Dynamic control creation (PictureBox, Label, Button) in code instead of Designer.vb to minimize Designer changes
   - ADODB for MDB database access, ALTER TABLE for auto-migration
   - LED resources: PNG images for filled/unfilled states (e.g., "0 Filled-50.png", "0-50.png")

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **Source Project (S50 - KY FRT CUSH):**
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50\FrmMain.vb` - Reference for IO condition variables (Hgt_LH_QY etc.), Control_2_Arry (LED mapping), CheckIOCondition(), LoadIOConditions from INI, ThreadTask3 (Module IO), toolstep logic in wStep=5/6, D_Value LED update in Tmr_Work_Tick, Button5_Click for FrmToolPos
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50\FrmToolPos.vb` - Tool position editor with 8 SpecNames, image click-to-set coordinates, INI save/load
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50\FrmToolPos.Designer.vb` - UI layout with picPreview, grpCoords, cboSpec, coordinate textboxes
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50\Module1.vb` - IniFile class, port variables, MDB connection functions

   **Target Project (ST40 - SP3 MECA):**
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\ST50.vbproj` (RootNamespace: S50, AssemblyName changed to SP3_LINE1_OP50(20260316))
     - Added FrmToolPos.vb, FrmToolPos.Designer.vb, FrmToolPos.resx compile/resource entries
     - Added 32 LED PNG resource file entries
   
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmMain.vb` - Major modifications:
     - Added variables: IO condition arrays (8 combos), CurrentToolP, toolstep, pos1-5 labels, Trd4
     - Control_2_Arry(): Creates LED panel (P_IN0-15 + P_OUT0-7 PictureBoxes), pos1-5 labels in Panel5, TOOL button programmatically
     - SerialOpen(): Added Serial_Module open (115200bps) with NONE check
     - New() constructor: Added D_OutString init, Trd4 (ThreadTask4_Module) start, LoadIOConditionsFromINI() call, ALTER TABLE for Module column
     - Init_Control(): Added pos1-5 clear and toolstep=0
     - Tmr_Work_Tick(): Added D_Value LED update loop (16 inputs)
     - wStep=5: Added IO condition determination based on HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × KY/QY, sets CurrentToolP and toolstep
     - wStep=6: Added toolstep-based IO condition checking (10-14 for N/HGT, 100-104 for HGT)
     - New functions: CheckIOCondition(), ThreadTask4_Module(), LoadIOConditionsFromINI(), Button5_Click()

   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmToolPos.vb` - Created (copied from S50 with English comments)
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmToolPos.Designer.vb` - Created (copied from S50)
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\Module1.vb` - Added Module to Load_Port_Data() and Save_Port_Data()
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmPort.vb` - Added ComboBox5 for Module port
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\FrmPort.Designer.vb` - Added Panel10, ComboBox5, Label4 for Module
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\My Project\Resources.resx` - Added 40 LED image resource entries
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\My Project\Resources.Designer.vb` - Added 40 LED image properties
   - `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\Resources\` - 32+ LED PNG files copied from S50

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **AxImp.exe not found (MSB3091)**: Using .NET Framework MSBuild couldn't find Windows SDK tools for COM ActiveX interop. Fixed by switching to VS 2022 BuildTools MSBuild at `C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/BuildTools/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe`
   - **0-501.png not found (MSB3103)**: Resources.resx agent added entries for `-501.png` files but they weren't copied initially. Fixed by copying `*501*` files from S50/Resources/ to ST40/Resources/
   - **DB Module column missing**: User explicitly requested auto-creation. Fixed by adding ALTER TABLE in FrmMain.New() with Try-Catch to ignore if column already exists

5. Problem Solving:
   - Chose dynamic control creation (programmatic) for P_IN/P_OUT PictureBoxes and pos labels instead of editing the large Designer.vb file - this minimized risk of breaking the designer
   - Used 3 parallel background agents for independent tasks (Resources, FrmToolPos, FrmPort/Module1) while directly editing FrmMain.vb
   - Both projects share RootNamespace "S50" so resource references work without changes

6. All user messages:
   - "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50 여기서 설정한부분 동일하게 다른 프로그램에도 적용하려고 함 일단 claude.md 확인해서 어떻게 구성 되어있는지 확인"
   - "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40 여기에 추가할거임 serialport 아이오 추가 / 바탕화면에 아이오 표시부 이식 / 이미지 표시폼 추가 / ini 로 편집하는 기능 추가 이해됨 ?"
   - "기존 프로젝트에 화면에 좌표 설정 표시부도 있지 앟나 ?" (asking about pos1-5 labels on main form)
   - "ㅇㅇ" (confirming to proceed)
   - "경로가 어디지" (asking about project/build output path)
   - "Table_SerialPort에 Module 컬럼 추가 필요 - 시작할때 없으면 추가"
   - "작업내역 저장"
   - "dsc_india_1 / dsc_india_2 커밋 푸쉬"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **Commit and push DSC_INDIA_1 repository** - git status checked, 164 files changed (2013 insertions, 829 deletions), includes KY FRT CUSH and SP3 MECA changes
   - **Commit and push DSC_INDIA_2 repository** - git status checked, 644 files changed (122073 deletions - mostly deleted files)
   - After git push, need to run `gdrive-sync push` per CLAUDE.md rules

8. Current Work:
   Was in the middle of committing and pushing DSC_INDIA_1 and DSC_INDIA_2 repositories. Already completed:
   - `gh auth switch --user ryudae33` ✓
   - Checked git status for both repos ✓
   - Checked git diff stats and recent commit messages for both repos ✓
   
   DSC_INDIA_1 status: 164 files changed, on branch master, up to date with origin/master. Last commit: "S50: IO 조건을 HGT/NHGT × LH/RH × QY/KY 8가지 조합으로 확장"
   
   DSC_INDIA_2 status: 644 files changed (mostly deletions), on branch master, up to date with origin/master. Last commit: "BN7i SPLIT RH: Lever Scan(Panel15) 기능 추가"

9. Optional Next Step:
   Continue with the user's explicit request: "dsc_india_1 / dsc_india_2 커밋 푸쉬"
   
   Next actions:
   1. Stage all changes in DSC_INDIA_1 and create commit with appropriate message
   2. Push DSC_INDIA_1 to remote
   3. Stage all changes in DSC_INDIA_2 and create commit
   4. Push DSC_INDIA_2 to remote
   5. Run `gdrive-sync push` after each push (per CLAUDE.md rules)

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\projects\C--Users-Administrator-Desktop\f7d19342-e5ac-47db-a0af-0e7a0ebb3007.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

ST40: Serial Module IO, LED display, FrmToolPos, INI IO conditions ported from S50

- Serial_Module IO communication (115200bps, S...E protocol)
- LED display (P_IN0~15 + P_OUT0~7) with dynamic PictureBox creation
- FrmToolPos image + coordinate editor (8 spec combinations)
- INI-based IO condition editing with CheckIOCondition()

- FrmPort Module port (ComboBox5)
- DB auto-migration (ALTER TABLE for Module column)
- LED resources (32 PNG files)

EOF
)"

content.text:
완료됐습니다.

- **DSC_INDIA_1**: `764719a` — ST40 Serial Module IO/LED/FrmToolPos/INI IO 이식
- **DSC_INDIA_2**: `3f00f23` — 불필요 파일 정리 (644파일 삭제)
- gdrive-sync push 양쪽 모두 완료

---

에이전트 안 쓴 이유: git add/commit/push는 순차 의존성이 있는 단순 명령이라 에이전트 오버헤드 없이 직접 실행하는 게 더 빠릅니다. 병렬로 돌릴 수 있는 독립 작업(DSC_INDIA_1 push와 DSC_INDIA_2 push)은 병렬 Bash로 처리했고요. 에이전트는 탐색/분석/빌드 같은 복잡한 작업에 쓰는 게 효율적입니다.
